```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
samples_RQ1 <- ps_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% ids_RQ1, timepoint == "T0", niche %in% c("NP", "OP")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(SampleID)

ps_RQ1 <- ps4_work %>%
  prune_samples(samples_RQ1, .) %>%
  prune_taxa(taxa_sums(.) > 0, .) %>%
  dedup_by_depth()

sd_RQ1 <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ID = as.character(ID),
    timepoint = as.character(timepoint)
  )

merged_RQ1 <- sd_RQ1 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(meta_RQ1, by = "ID")

rownames(merged_RQ1) <- merged_RQ1$SampleID
merged_RQ1$SampleID <- NULL
sample_data(ps_RQ1) <- sample_data(merged_RQ1)

saveRDS(ps_RQ1, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Build RQ2 phyloseq
# ------------------------------------------------------------
samples_RQ2 <- ps_meta %>%
  dplyr::filter(ID %in% ids_RQ2, timepoint %in% c("T0", "T1"), niche %in% c("NP", "OP")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(SampleID)

ps_RQ2 <- prune_samples(samples_RQ2, ps4_work)
ps_RQ2 <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_RQ2) > 0, ps_RQ2)
ps_RQ2 <- dedup_by_depth(ps_RQ2, c("ID", "timepoint", "niche"))

sd_RQ2 <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ2), "data.frame") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ID = as.character(ID),
    timepoint = as.character(timepoint)
  )

meta_for_join <- metadata_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ID = as.character(ID),
    timepoint = as.character(timepoint)
  )

merged_RQ2 <- sd_RQ2 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(meta_for_join, by = c("ID", "timepoint")) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(lf_wide_RQ2, by = "ID")

rownames(merged_RQ2) <- merged_RQ2$SampleID
merged_RQ2$SampleID <- NULL
sample_data(ps_RQ2) <- sample_data(merged_RQ2)

saveRDS(ps_RQ2, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ2_LFboth_micro_pairedNiche.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Paired-only within-niche version of RQ2
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sd2 <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ2), "data.frame") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ID = as.character(ID),
    timepoint = as.character(timepoint),
    niche = as.character(niche)
  )

paired_id_niche <- sd2 %>%
  dplyr::distinct(ID, timepoint, niche) %>%
  dplyr::count(ID, niche, name = "n_tp") %>%
  dplyr::filter(n_tp == 2) %>%
  dplyr::select(ID, niche)

keep_samples <- sd2 %>%
  dplyr::semi_join(paired_id_niche, by = c("ID", "niche")) %>%
  dplyr::pull(SampleID)

ps_RQ2_pairedOnly <- prune_samples(keep_samples, ps_RQ2)
ps_RQ2_pairedOnly <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly) > 0, ps_RQ2_pairedOnly)

saveRDS(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ2_pairedNiche_only.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 9. Add RespDx
# ------------------------------------------------------------
make_respdx <- function(meta) {
  to_yesno <- function(x) dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c(1, "1", "yes", "Yes", "YES", TRUE) ~ "yes",
    x %in% c(0, "0", "no", "No", "NO", FALSE) ~ "no",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  a <- to_yesno(meta$asthma_current)
  c <- to_yesno(meta$copd_doc_diag)
  y <- ifelse((!is.na(a) & a == "yes") | (!is.na(c) & c == "yes"), "yes", "no")
  factor(y, levels = c("no", "yes"))
}

sd <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")
phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ1)$RespDx <- make_respdx(sd)

sd <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ2), "data.frame")
phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ2)$RespDx <- make_respdx(sd)

sd <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly), "data.frame")
phyloseq::sample_data(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly)$RespDx <- make_respdx(sd)

# Save again after RespDx added
saveRDS(ps_RQ1, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth.rds")
saveRDS(ps_RQ2, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ2_LFboth_micro_pairedNiche.rds")
saveRDS(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ2_pairedNiche_only.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 10. Quick checks
# ------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n=== ORIGINAL ps4_longitudinal stays intact ===\n")
cat("Samples original:", nsamples(ps4_longitudinal_orig), "\n")

cat("\n=== RQ1 ===\n") 
sd1 <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")
cat("Samples:", nsamples(ps_RQ1), "\n") # 2137
cat("Unique IDs:", length(unique(sd1$ID)), "\n") # 110
print(table(sd1$timepoint)) # 168
print(table(sd1$niche)) # NP 95 OP 73 

cat("\n=== RQ2 ===\n")
sd2b <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ2), "data.frame")
cat("Samples:", nsamples(ps_RQ2), "\n") # 370
cat("Unique IDs:", length(unique(sd2b$ID)), "\n") # 108
print(table(sd2b$timepoint)) # T0 166, T1 204
print(table(sd2b$niche))# NP 190, OP 180

cat("\n=== RQ2 paired-only (optional) ===\n")
sd2p <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly), "data.frame")
cat("Samples:", nsamples(ps_RQ2_pairedOnly), "\n") # 312
cat("Unique IDs:", length(unique(sd2p$ID)), "\n") # 108
print(table(sd2p$timepoint)) # T0 156, T1 156
print(table(sd2p$niche)) # NP 168, OP 144

cat("\n=== RQ1 key variables present ===\n")
print(c(
  "age_T0",
  "gender_T0",
  "smoke_status_T0",
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
) %in% colnames(as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")))


# Check the difference between the ps_RQ2_pairedOnly and RQ1 participants i.e. how many are the same? 
ids_RQ2 <- ps_RQ2_pairedOnly@sam_data$ID
ids_RQ1 <- ps_RQ1@sam_data$ID

length(intersect(ids_RQ2, ids_RQ1)) # 108 intersect
setdiff(ids_RQ2, ids_RQ1) # 0 in RQ2 but not in RQ1 
setdiff(ids_RQ1, ids_RQ2) # 2 in RQ1 but not in RQ2: "21255" "30381"
```
# Add season 
```{r}
get_season <- function(date_vec) {
  mo <- month(date_vec)
  out <- ifelse(mo %in% 3:5,  "Spring",
         ifelse(mo %in% 6:8,  "Summer",
         ifelse(mo %in% 9:11, "Autumn", "Winter")))
  factor(out, levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"))
}

sd_l <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame") %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  mutate(
    date_spiro_T0 = ymd(date_spiro_T0),
    # pick the spirometry date corresponding to the sample timepoint
    date_spiro_this_tp = case_when(
      timepoint == "T0" ~ date_spiro_T0,
      TRUE ~ as.Date(NA)
    ),
    season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = get_season(date_spiro_this_tp)
  )


# Put back into phyloseq
rownames(sd_l) <- sd_l$SampleID
sd_l$SampleID <- NULL
sample_data(ps_RQ1) <- sample_data(sd_l)

# checks
table(sample_data(ps_RQ1)$timepoint, useNA = "ifany") # 168
table(sample_data(ps_RQ1)$season_microbiome_sampling_T0, useNA = "ifany")
# Winter Spring Summer Autumn 
#     39     42     22     65 

saveRDS(ps_RQ1, "../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth.rds")
```

# Population summary tables
## Summary of health data at T0 and T1 for longitudinal participants (fixed)
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summary of health data at T0 and T1 for longitudinal participants
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ps_VGO3 <- readRDS("../Output/Cross_sectional/Phyloseq/ps_final_VGO3.rds")
ps_meta_VGO3 <- sample_data(ps_VGO3)
ps_meta_VGO3$Sam_ID <- rownames(ps_VGO3@sam_data)

IDs_long <- unique(as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")$ID)

# Subset phyloseq to those IDs of participants with longitudinal LF and microbiome data
samples_keep_VGO3 <- ps_meta_VGO3$Sam_ID[ps_meta_VGO3$VGO3_ID %in% IDs_long]

ps_VGO3_longitudinal <- prune_samples(samples_keep_VGO3, ps_VGO3)

# Add RespDx to VGO3 metadata
make_respdx_vgo3 <- function(meta) {
  to_yesno <- function(x) dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c(1, "1", "yes", "Yes", "YES", TRUE) ~ "yes",
    x %in% c(0, "0", "no", "No", "NO", FALSE) ~ "no",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  a <- to_yesno(meta$Asthma_current)
  c <- to_yesno(meta$COPD_emphy_doc_diag)
  y <- ifelse((!is.na(a) & a == "yes") | (!is.na(c) & c == "yes"), "yes", "no")
  factor(y, levels = c("no", "yes"))
}

sd_long <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal), "data.frame")
phyloseq::sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal)$RespDx <- make_respdx_vgo3(sd_long)

# Keep only NP/OP and one row per participant, preferring NP over OP
sd_long <- sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal) %>%
  data.frame(check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(niche %in% c("NP", "OP"))

sd_vgo3_long <- sd_long %>%
  dplyr::mutate(niche_rank = ifelse(niche == "NP", 1L, 2L)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(VGO3_ID, niche_rank) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!duplicated(VGO3_ID)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-niche_rank)

df_vgo3_longitudinal <- sd_vgo3_long %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Age, Gender, Height, Weight, BMI, Ethnicity, Education_level, RespDx,
    Lung_med, Asthma_med_current, Antibiotics_lastmonth, Antibiotics_lastyr,
    Pneumonia_lastyr, Asthma_ever, Asthma_doc_diag, Asthma_attk_lastyr,
    COPD_emphy_doc_diag, Smoking_status, Farm_childhood, Farm_visit_lastyr,
    T0_wkprior_NH3, T1_wkprior_NH3, FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF,
    FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

cont_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  m <- mean(x)
  s <- sd(x)
  q <- stats::quantile(x, probs = c(.25, .5, .75), na.rm = TRUE)
  sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)\n%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", m, s, q[2], q[1], q[3])
}

cat_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- factor(x)
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_character_)
  n_tot <- sum(!is.na(x))
  levs <- levels(x)
  out <- sapply(levs, function(lv) {
    n <- sum(x == lv, na.rm = TRUE)
    pct <- if (n_tot > 0) 100 * n / n_tot else NA_real_
    sprintf("%s: %d (%.3f%%)", lv, n, pct)
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

rows_vgo3_longitudinal <- tibble::tibble(
  Variable = c(
    "Age", "Gender", "Height", "Weight", "BMI", "Ethnicity", "Education_level", "RespDx",
    "Lung_med", "Asthma_med_current", "Antibiotics_lastmonth", "Antibiotics_lastyr",
    "Pneumonia_lastyr", "Asthma_ever", "Asthma_doc_diag", "Asthma_attk_lastyr",
    "COPD_emphy_doc_diag", "Smoking_status", "Farm_childhood", "Farm_visit_lastyr",
    "T0_wkprior_NH3", "T1_wkprior_NH3", "FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1_FVC", "MMEF",
    "FEV1_pred", "FVC_pred", "FEV1FVC_pred", "MMEF_pred"
  ),
  `VGO3` = c(
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Age),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Gender),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Height),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Weight),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$BMI),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Ethnicity),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Education_level),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$RespDx),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Lung_med),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Asthma_med_current),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Antibiotics_lastmonth),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Antibiotics_lastyr),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Pneumonia_lastyr),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Asthma_ever),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Asthma_doc_diag),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Asthma_attk_lastyr),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$COPD_emphy_doc_diag),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Smoking_status),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Farm_childhood),
    cat_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$Farm_visit_lastyr),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$T0_wkprior_NH3),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$T1_wkprior_NH3),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FEV1),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FVC),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FEV1_FVC),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$MMEF),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FEV1_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$FEV1FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo3_longitudinal$MMEF_pred)
  )
)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list("Table 1 - VGO3" = rows_vgo3_longitudinal),
  path = "../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/Table1_longitudinal_T1.xlsx"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# VGO2 longitudinal data
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps_meta_VGO2 <- read.csv("../Output/Cross_sectional/Participant_data/VGO2_data.csv")
ps_meta_VGO2$ID <- as.character(ps_meta_VGO2$ID)

samples_keep_VGO2 <- ps_meta_VGO2[ps_meta_VGO2$ID %in% IDs_long, ]

# Convert height from meters to cm
samples_keep_VGO2 <- samples_keep_VGO2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(height = height * 100)

make_respdx_vgo2 <- function(meta,
                             asthma_col = "asthma_current",
                             copd_col = "copd_doc_diag") {
  to_yesno <- function(x) dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c(1, "1", "yes", "Yes", "YES", TRUE) ~ "yes",
    x %in% c(0, "0", "no", "No", "NO", FALSE) ~ "no",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  a <- to_yesno(meta[[asthma_col]])
  c <- to_yesno(meta[[copd_col]])
  y <- dplyr::if_else((!is.na(a) & a == "yes") | (!is.na(c) & c == "yes"), "yes", "no")
  factor(y, levels = c("no", "yes"))
}

samples_keep_VGO2$RespDx <- make_respdx_vgo2(samples_keep_VGO2)

df_vgo2_longitudinal <- samples_keep_VGO2 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    age, gender, height, weight, bmi, ethnicity, educationlevel, RespDx,
    asthma_med_current, pneumo_lastyr, asthma_ever, asthma_doc_diag,
    asthma_attk_lastyr, copd_doc_diag, smoke_status, farmchild,
    FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF, FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

rows_vgo2_longitudinal <- tibble::tibble(
  Variable = c(
    "age", "gender", "height", "weight", "bmi", "ethnicity", "RespDx", "educationlevel",
    "asthma_med_current", "pneumo_lastyr", "asthma_ever", "asthma_doc_diag",
    "asthma_attk_lastyr", "copd_doc_diag", "smoke_status", "farmchild",
    "FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1_FVC", "MMEF", "FEV1_pred", "FVC_pred", "FEV1FVC_pred", "MMEF_pred"
  ),
  `VGO2` = c(
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$age),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$gender),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$height),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$weight),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$bmi),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$ethnicity),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$RespDx),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$educationlevel),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$asthma_med_current),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$pneumo_lastyr),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$asthma_ever),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$asthma_doc_diag),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$asthma_attk_lastyr),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$copd_doc_diag),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$smoke_status),
    cat_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$farmchild),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FEV1),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FVC),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FEV1_FVC),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$MMEF),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FEV1_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$FEV1FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(df_vgo2_longitudinal$MMEF_pred)
  )
)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list("Table 1 - VGO2" = rows_vgo2_longitudinal),
  path = "../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/Table1_longitudinal_T0.xlsx"
)
```


## Summary of health data at T0 and T1 for longitudinal participants (with p values)
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Paired T0 vs T1 summary table with p values
# ------------------------------------------------------------

ps_VGO3 <- readRDS("../Output/Cross_sectional/Phyloseq/ps_final_VGO3.rds")
ps_meta_VGO3 <- sample_data(ps_VGO3)
ps_meta_VGO3$Sam_ID <- rownames(ps_VGO3@sam_data)

IDs_long <- unique(as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")$ID)

samples_keep_VGO3 <- ps_meta_VGO3$Sam_ID[ps_meta_VGO3$VGO3_ID %in% IDs_long]
ps_VGO3_longitudinal <- prune_samples(samples_keep_VGO3, ps_VGO3)

sd_long <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal), "data.frame")
phyloseq::sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal)$RespDx <- make_respdx_vgo3(sd_long)

sd_long <- sample_data(ps_VGO3_longitudinal) %>%
  data.frame(check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::filter(niche %in% c("NP", "OP"))

sd_vgo3_long <- sd_long %>%
  dplyr::mutate(niche_rank = ifelse(niche == "NP", 1L, 2L)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(VGO3_ID, niche_rank) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!duplicated(VGO3_ID)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-niche_rank)

df_vgo3_longitudinal <- sd_vgo3_long %>%
  dplyr::select(
    VGO3_ID, Age, Gender, Height, Weight, BMI, Ethnicity, Education_level, RespDx,
    Asthma_med_current, Pneumonia_lastyr, Asthma_ever, Asthma_doc_diag,
    Asthma_attk_lastyr, COPD_emphy_doc_diag, Smoking_status, Farm_childhood,
    FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF, FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

df_T1 <- df_vgo3_longitudinal %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    ID = as.character(VGO3_ID),
    Age, Gender, Height, Weight, BMI, Ethnicity, Education_level, RespDx,
    Asthma_med_current, Pneumonia_lastyr, Asthma_ever, Asthma_doc_diag,
    Asthma_attk_lastyr, COPD_emphy_doc_diag, Smoking_status, Farm_childhood,
    FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF, FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

ps_meta_VGO2 <- read.csv("../Output/Cross_sectional/Participant_data/VGO2_data.csv")
ps_meta_VGO2$ID <- as.character(ps_meta_VGO2$ID)

samples_keep_VGO2 <- ps_meta_VGO2[ps_meta_VGO2$ID %in% IDs_long, ]
samples_keep_VGO2$RespDx <- make_respdx_vgo2(samples_keep_VGO2)
samples_keep_VGO2 <- samples_keep_VGO2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(height = height * 100)

df_vgo2_longitudinal <- samples_keep_VGO2 %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ID, age, gender, height, weight, bmi, ethnicity, educationlevel, RespDx,
    asthma_med_current, pneumo_lastyr, asthma_ever, asthma_doc_diag,
    asthma_attk_lastyr, copd_doc_diag, smoke_status, farmchild,
    FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF, FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

df_T0 <- df_vgo2_longitudinal %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    ID,
    Age = age,
    Gender = gender,
    Height = height,
    Weight = weight,
    BMI = bmi,
    Ethnicity = ethnicity,
    Education_level = educationlevel,
    RespDx = RespDx,
    Asthma_med_current = asthma_med_current,
    Pneumonia_lastyr = pneumo_lastyr,
    Asthma_ever = asthma_ever,
    Asthma_doc_diag = asthma_doc_diag,
    Asthma_attk_lastyr = asthma_attk_lastyr,
    COPD_emphy_doc_diag = copd_doc_diag,
    Smoking_status = smoke_status,
    Farm_childhood = farmchild,
    FEV1, FVC, FEV1_FVC, MMEF, FEV1_pred, FVC_pred, FEV1FVC_pred, MMEF_pred
  )

paired_df <- dplyr::inner_join(df_T0, df_T1, by = "ID", suffix = c("_T0", "_T1"))

cont_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  m <- mean(x)
  s <- sd(x)
  q <- stats::quantile(x, probs = c(.25, .5, .75), na.rm = TRUE)
  sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)\n%.1f [%.1f, %.1f]", m, s, q[2], q[1], q[3])
}

cat_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- factor(x)
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_character_)
  n_tot <- sum(!is.na(x))
  levs <- levels(x)
  out <- sapply(levs, function(lv) {
    n <- sum(x == lv, na.rm = TRUE)
    pct <- if (n_tot > 0) 100 * n / n_tot else NA_real_
    sprintf("%s: %d (%.1f%%)", lv, n, pct)
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

bowker_test <- function(tab) {
  k <- nrow(tab)
  stat <- 0
  for (i in 1:(k - 1)) for (j in (i + 1):k) {
    nij <- tab[i, j]
    nji <- tab[j, i]
    if ((nij + nji) > 0) stat <- stat + (nij - nji)^2 / (nij + nji)
  }
  df <- k * (k - 1) / 2
  p <- stats::pchisq(stat, df = df, lower.tail = FALSE)
  list(statistic = stat, df = df, p.value = p)
}

paired_pval <- function(x0, x1, type = c("cont", "cat")) {
  type <- match.arg(type)
  keep <- stats::complete.cases(x0, x1)
  x0 <- x0[keep]
  x1 <- x1[keep]
  if (!length(x0)) return(NA_real_)

  if (type == "cont") {
    out <- try(stats::t.test(x0, x1, paired = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(out, "try-error")) {
      out <- stats::wilcox.test(x0, x1, paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
    }
    return(out$p.value)
  } else {
    lvls <- sort(unique(c(as.character(x0), as.character(x1))))
    f0 <- factor(x0, levels = lvls)
    f1 <- factor(x1, levels = lvls)
    tab <- table(f0, f1)

    if (nrow(tab) == 2 && ncol(tab) == 2) {
      return(stats::mcnemar.test(tab)$p.value)
    } else {
      return(bowker_test(tab)$p.value)
    }
  }
}

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  format.pval(p, digits = 3, eps = 0.001)
}

spec <- tibble::tibble(
  Variable = c(
    "Age", "Gender", "Height", "Weight", "BMI", "Ethnicity", "Education level", "RespDx",
    "Asthma medication (current)", "Pneumonia (last year)", "Asthma ever", "Asthma diagnosis (doctor)",
    "Asthma attack (last year)", "COPD/emphysema diagnosis (doctor)", "Smoking status", "Farm childhood",
    "FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1/FVC", "MMEF (FEF25-75)",
    "FEV1 %pred", "FVC %pred", "FEV1/FVC %pred", "MMEF %pred"
  ),
  var = c(
    "Age", "Gender", "Height", "Weight", "BMI", "Ethnicity", "Education_level", "RespDx",
    "Asthma_med_current", "Pneumonia_lastyr", "Asthma_ever", "Asthma_doc_diag",
    "Asthma_attk_lastyr", "COPD_emphy_doc_diag", "Smoking_status", "Farm_childhood",
    "FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1_FVC", "MMEF",
    "FEV1_pred", "FVC_pred", "FEV1FVC_pred", "MMEF_pred"
  ),
  type = c(
    "cont", "cat", "cont", "cont", "cont", "cat", "cat", "cat",
    "cat", "cat", "cat", "cat", "cat", "cat", "cat", "cat",
    "cont", "cont", "cont", "cont", "cont", "cont", "cont", "cont"
  )
)

rows_longitudinal_compare <- spec %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    `VGO2 (T0)` = if (type == "cont") cont_summary(paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T0")]]) else cat_summary(paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T0")]]),
    `VGO3 (T1)` = if (type == "cont") cont_summary(paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T1")]]) else cat_summary(paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T1")]]),
    `p-value` = fmt_p(paired_pval(
      paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T0")]],
      paired_df[[paste0(var, "_T1")]],
      type = type
    ))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Variable, `VGO2 (T0)`, `VGO3 (T1)`, `p-value`)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list("Table 1 - T0 vs T1" = rows_longitudinal_compare),
  path = "../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/Table1_longitudinal_T0_vs_T1_with_p.xlsx"
)
```

## Summary of lung function changes
```{r}
RQ1_meta <- as(sample_data(ps_RQ1), "data.frame")

cont_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(NA_character_)
  m <- mean(x)
  s <- sd(x)
  q <- stats::quantile(x, probs = c(.25, .5, .75), na.rm = TRUE)
  sprintf("%.1f (%.1f)\n%.1f [%.1f, %.1f]", m, s, q[2], q[1], q[3])
}

cat_summary <- function(x) {
  x <- factor(x)
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_character_)
  n_tot <- sum(!is.na(x))
  levs <- levels(x)
  out <- sapply(levs, function(lv) {
    n <- sum(x == lv, na.rm = TRUE)
    pct <- if (n_tot > 0) 100 * n / n_tot else NA_real_
    sprintf("%s: %d (%.1f%%)", lv, n, pct)
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  paste(out, collapse = "\n")
}

rows_both <- tibble::tibble(
  Variable = c(
    "fuperiod",
    "delta_FEV1_pred",
    "delta_FVC_pred",
    "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
    "delta_MMEF_pred",
    "obstr_VGO2",
    "obstr_VGO3",
    "new_obstr"
  ),
  Summary = c(
    cont_summary(RQ1_meta$fuperiod),
    cont_summary(RQ1_meta$delta_FEV1_pred),
    cont_summary(RQ1_meta$delta_FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(RQ1_meta$delta_FEV1FVC_pred),
    cont_summary(RQ1_meta$delta_MMEF_pred),
    cat_summary(RQ1_meta$obstr_VGO2),
    cat_summary(RQ1_meta$obstr_VGO3),
    cat_summary(RQ1_meta$new_obstr)
  )
)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list("Table 1 - change" = rows_both),
  path = "../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/Table1_VGO2toVGO3_change.xlsx"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot change
# ------------------------------------------------------------
RQ1_meta_unique <- RQ1_meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    nonmiss_lf = rowSums(dplyr::across(
      dplyr::all_of(c("delta_FEV1_pred", "delta_FVC_pred", "delta_FEV1FVC_pred", "delta_MMEF_pred")),
      ~ !is.na(.x)
    ))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(ID, dplyr::desc(nonmiss_lf)) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ID) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(
    ID,
    delta_FEV1_pred,
    delta_FVC_pred,
    delta_FEV1FVC_pred,
    delta_MMEF_pred
  )

plot_df <- RQ1_meta_unique %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(delta_FEV1_pred, delta_FVC_pred, delta_FEV1FVC_pred, delta_MMEF_pred),
    names_to = "Measure",
    values_to = "Delta"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Delta)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Measure = dplyr::recode(
      Measure,
      delta_FEV1_pred = "ΔFEV1",
      delta_FVC_pred = "ΔFVC",
      delta_FEV1FVC_pred = "ΔFEV1/FVC",
      delta_MMEF_pred = "ΔFEF25–75"
    ),
    Measure = factor(Measure, levels = c("ΔFEF25–75", "ΔFEV1/FVC", "ΔFVC", "ΔFEV1")),
    Direction = dplyr::if_else(
      Delta >= 0,
      "Slower decline than GLI-expected",
      "Faster decline than GLI-expected"
    )
  )

summ_df <- plot_df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Measure) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    med = median(Delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1 = quantile(Delta, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3 = quantile(Delta, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_slower = mean(Delta >= 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    p_faster = mean(Delta < 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_delta <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = Delta, y = Measure)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_violin(fill = "grey70", color = NA, width = 0.85, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = summ_df,
    aes(xmin = q1, xmax = q3, y = Measure),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    height = 0,
    linewidth = 1.0
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = summ_df,
    aes(x = med, y = Measure),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(color = Direction),
    position = position_jitter(height = 0.12, width = 0),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Annualised change in GLI-referenced lung function\n(% predicted per year: T1 − T0)",
    y = NULL,
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12)
  )

ggsave(
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/Deltas_VGO2toVGO3.svg",
  plot_delta,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```
# ANALYSES
## Read in data
```{r}
ps_l <- readRDS("../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth.rds")
```

# How is microbiome at T0 associated with lung function at T1?
# Separate microbiome data per dataset and niche
```{r}
# Subset per niche
# VGO3_NPOP dataset, NP niche
T0_NP <- subset_samples(ps_l, niche == "NP")
nsamples(T0_NP) # 95 NP samples

# VGO3_NPOP dataset, OP niche
T0_OP <- subset_samples(ps_l, niche == "OP")
nsamples(T0_OP) # 73 OP samples
```
# Count ASVs, phyla, class, order etc. in dataset
```{r}
nphyla <- function(ps) {
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))
  dplyr::n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$phylum))
}
ntaxa(ps_l) # 6020
nphyla(ps_l) # 35

# Extract taxonomy table
tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_l))
colnames(ps_l@tax_table)

# Count taxa at each rank
tax_counts <- list(
  ASVs    = ntaxa(ps_l),
  Phylum  = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$phylum)),
  Class   = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$class)),
  Order   = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$order)),
  Family  = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$family)),
  Genus   = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$genus)),
  Species = n_distinct(na.omit(tax_df$species))
)

tax_counts


# $ASVs
# [1] 6020
# $Phylum
# [1] 35
# $Class
# [1] 84
# $Order
# [1] 190
# $Family
# [1] 321
# $Genus
# [1] 797
# $Species
# [1] 717
```

# Filter taxa and convert to relative abundance
```{r}
# VGO3 NP 
# Remove low abundant ASVs and convert counts to relative abundances
T0_NP_filtered <- T0_NP %>% 
  pres_abund_filter() %>% # 0.1% relative abundance in at least 2 samples is default
  to_RA()
# A total of 477 ASVs were found to be present at or above a level of confident detection (0.1% relative abundance) in at least 2 samples (n = 5543 ASVs excluded).

# VGO3 OP 
# Remove low abundant ASVs and convert counts to relative abundances
T0_OP_filtered <- T0_OP %>% 
  pres_abund_filter() %>% 
  to_RA()
# A total of 215 ASVs were found to be present at or above a level of confident detection (0.1% relative abundance) in at least 2 samples (n = 5805 ASVs excluded).
```
# Extract OTU and metadata 
```{r}
otu_t0_np <- t(as.data.frame(otu_table(T0_NP_filtered)))
meta_t0_np <- meta_to_df(T0_NP_filtered, sample_name = ".row_id")

otu_t0_op <- t(as.data.frame(otu_table(T0_OP_filtered)))
meta_t0_op <- meta_to_df(T0_OP_filtered, sample_name = ".row_id")
```
# Alpha diversity violin plots
```{r}
alpha_metrics <- c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson")

#  Extract metadata + join alpha diversity
meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_l)) %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Iden")

alpha_long <- meta %>%
  select(any_of(c("niche", alpha_metrics))) %>%
  mutate(across(any_of(alpha_metrics), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x)))) %>%
  filter(niche %in% c("NP", "OP")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = any_of(alpha_metrics),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(value)) %>%
  mutate(
    niche  = factor(niche, levels = c("NP", "OP")),
    metric = factor(metric, levels = alpha_metrics)
  )

# Same colours as before
niche_cols <- c(
  NP = "#7987AF",
  OP = "#7c674d"
)

# Same theme as before (grid lines + black border)
base_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey85", linewidth = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.25),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.7),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  )

# ---- Plot ----
p_violin <- ggplot(alpha_long, aes(x = niche, y = value, fill = niche)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.55, linewidth = 0.35, colour = "black") +
  geom_jitter(aes(colour = niche), width = 0.10, alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.16, outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white", colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.45, alpha = 1
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = niche_cols) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = niche_cols) +
  labs(
    title = "Alpha diversity stratified by niche (NP vs OP)",
    y = "Alpha diversity value"
  ) +
  base_theme +
  guides(fill = "none", colour = "none")

print(p_violin)

# ---- Save ----
outdir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/Alpha_diversity/Violinplots"
dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(outdir, "alpha_diversity_violin_by_niche_ps_l.svg"),
  plot = p_violin,
  width = 6,
  height = 3
)
```
# Alpha diversity and lung function at T1 
```{r}
# Alpha diversity and lung function at T1 
# Multivariable models, pooled by niche (NP / OP)

dataset_list <- list(
  T0_NP = meta_t0_np,
  T0_OP = meta_t0_op
)

alpha_vars <- c("Observed", "Shannon", "Simpson")

lung_fun_cont <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

core_covariates <- c(
  "age_T0",
  "gender_T0",
  "smoke_status_T0",
  "season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)

# Pretty labels (FIXED)
pretty_alpha <- c(
  "Observed_z" = "Observed richness",
  "Shannon_z"  = "Shannon diversity",
  "Simpson_z"  = "Simpson diversity"
)

pretty_lung <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1_z"       = "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC_pred_T1_z"        = "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1_z"    = "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF_pred_T1_z"       = "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "delta_FEV1_pred_z"    = "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FVC_pred_z"     = "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred_z" = "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_MMEF_pred_z"    = "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Preprocessing (FIXED to use T0/T1 variables)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      age_T0 = as.numeric(age_T0),

      FEV1_pred_T1 = as.numeric(FEV1_pred_T1),
      FVC_pred_T1 = as.numeric(FVC_pred_T1),
      FEV1FVC_pred_T1 = as.numeric(FEV1FVC_pred_T1),
      MMEF_pred_T1 = as.numeric(MMEF_pred_T1),

      delta_FEV1_pred = as.numeric(delta_FEV1_pred),
      delta_FVC_pred = as.numeric(delta_FVC_pred),
      delta_FEV1FVC_pred = as.numeric(delta_FEV1FVC_pred),
      delta_MMEF_pred = as.numeric(delta_MMEF_pred),

      Observed = as.numeric(Observed),
      Shannon = as.numeric(Shannon),
      Simpson = as.numeric(Simpson),

      gender_T0 = factor(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(gender_T0))),
      smoke_status_T0 = factor(
        tolower(as.character(smoke_status_T0)),
        levels = c("non", "former", "current"),
        ordered = TRUE
      ),
      season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(
        stringr::str_to_title(as.character(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
        levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn"),
        ordered = TRUE
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Observed_z = as.numeric(scale(Observed)),
      Shannon_z  = as.numeric(scale(Shannon)),
      Simpson_z  = as.numeric(scale(Simpson))
    )

  for (lf in lung_fun_cont) {
    if (lf %in% names(df)) {
      df[[paste0(lf, "_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(df[[lf]]))
    }
  }

  df
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Model fitting
# ------------------------------------------------------------
fit_pooled_mv <- function(df, dataset_name) {
  df <- preprocess_dataset(df)

  alpha_z <- c("Observed_z", "Shannon_z", "Simpson_z")
  lung_z <- paste0(lung_fun_cont, "_z")

  out <- list()

  for (a in alpha_z) {
    for (lz in lung_z) {

      need <- c(a, lz, core_covariates)
      if (!all(need %in% names(df))) next

      dat <- df %>%
        dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(need)) %>%
        tidyr::drop_na()

      if (nrow(dat) < 20) next

      fml <- stats::as.formula(
        paste(a, "~", paste(c(lz, core_covariates), collapse = " + "))
      )

      fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(fml, data = dat), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(fit)) next

      row <- broom::tidy(fit) %>%
        dplyr::filter(term == lz)

      if (nrow(row) == 0) next

      out[[length(out) + 1]] <- tibble::tibble(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        niche = dplyr::recode(dataset_name, T0_NP = "NP", T0_OP = "OP"),
        alpha_metric = a,
        lung_var = lz,
        estimate = row$estimate,
        std.error = row$std.error,
        p.value = row$p.value,
        n_used = stats::nobs(fit)
      )
    }
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Run models
# ------------------------------------------------------------
mv_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$T0_NP, "T0_NP"),
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$T0_OP, "T0_OP")
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    alpha_metric = dplyr::recode(alpha_metric, !!!pretty_alpha),
    lung_var = dplyr::recode(lung_var, !!!pretty_lung)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    stars = dplyr::case_when(
      q.value <= 0.05 ~ "***",
      q.value <= 0.10 ~ "**",
      q.value <= 0.25 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()


# Plot heatmap
pal <- try(rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser"), silent = TRUE)
if (inherits(pal, "try-error")) {
  pal <- c("#2166ac", "#67a9cf", "#d1e5f0", "#f7f7f7", "#fddbc7", "#ef8a62", "#b2182b")
}

lim <- max(abs(mv_all$estimate), na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(lim)) lim <- 1

plot_df <- mv_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lung_var = factor(
      lung_var,
      levels = rev(c(
        "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
        "FVC % predicted (T1)",
        "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
        "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
        "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
        "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
        "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
        "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
      ))
    ),
    alpha_metric = factor(
      alpha_metric,
      levels = c("Observed richness", "Shannon diversity", "Simpson diversity")
    ),
    niche = factor(niche, levels = c("NP", "OP"))
  )

p_mv <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  plot_df,
  ggplot2::aes(x = alpha_metric, y = lung_var, fill = estimate)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = stars), size = 4) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = pal[1],
    mid = pal[4],
    high = pal[7],
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-lim, lim),
    name = "Std. β (per 1 SD higher lung function)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ niche, nrow = 1) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Alpha diversity metric",
    y = "Lung function metric",
    title = "Multivariable models (pooled; adjusted for age, gender, smoking, season)"
  )

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_heatmap.svg",
  p_mv,
  width = 8,
  height = 4
)

readr::write_csv(
  mv_all,
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_results.csv"
)
```


# Beta diversity 
### Multivariable PERMANOVA
```{r}
# ============================================================
# RQ1: Multivariable PERMANOVA
# T0 microbiome composition vs T1 lung function / lung function change
# ============================================================

perms <- 999
set.seed(202501)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Read RQ1 phyloseq and original longitudinal metadata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps_rq1 <- readRDS("../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth_withSeason.rds")

metadata_all <- read.csv("../Output/Longitudinal/Participant_data/VGO_combined_longitudinal.csv") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    ID = as.character(ID),
    timepoint = as.character(timepoint),
    age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(age))),
    gender = as.character(gender),
    smoke_status = as.character(smoke_status),
    FEV1_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1_pred))),
    FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FVC_pred))),
    FEV1FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1FVC_pred))),
    MMEF_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(MMEF_pred))),
    delta_FEV1_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FEV1_pred))),
    delta_FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FVC_pred))),
    delta_FEV1FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FEV1FVC_pred))),
    delta_MMEF_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_MMEF_pred)))
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Build explicit T0 covariates + T1 outcomes by ID
# ------------------------------------------------------------
meta_T0 <- metadata_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(timepoint == "T0") %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    ID,
    age_T0 = age,
    gender_T0 = factor(stringr::str_to_title(gender)),
    smoke_status_T0 = factor(
      tolower(smoke_status),
      levels = c("non", "former", "current"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )

meta_T1 <- metadata_all %>%
  dplyr::filter(timepoint == "T1") %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    ID,
    FEV1_pred_T1 = FEV1_pred,
    FVC_pred_T1 = FVC_pred,
    FEV1FVC_pred_T1 = FEV1FVC_pred,
    MMEF_pred_T1 = MMEF_pred
  )

meta_rq1_explicit <- meta_T0 %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(meta_T1, by = "ID")


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Merge explicit metadata into ps_rq1 sample_data
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sd_rq1 <- as(sample_data(ps_rq1), "data.frame") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(ID = as.character(ID))

sd_rq1_explicit <- sd_rq1 %>%
  dplyr::left_join(meta_rq1_explicit, by = "ID") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
      levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )

rownames(sd_rq1_explicit) <- sd_rq1_explicit$SampleID
sd_rq1_explicit$SampleID <- NULL
sample_data(ps_rq1) <- sample_data(sd_rq1_explicit)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Variables for PERMANOVA
# ------------------------------------------------------------
lung_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

covars_adj <- c(
  "age_T0",
  "gender_T0",
  "smoke_status_T0",
  "season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Main runner
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_permanova_niche <- function(ps_obj, niche_keep, outcomes, covars, perms = 999) {
  sd0 <- as(sample_data(ps_obj), "data.frame")

  keep_samp <- as.character(sd0$niche) == niche_keep
  ps_n <- prune_samples(keep_samp, ps_obj)
  ps_n <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_n) > 0, ps_n)

  if (nsamples(ps_n) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }

  # Relative abundance
  ps_ra <- transform_sample_counts(
    ps_n,
    function(x) if (sum(x) == 0) x else x / sum(x)
  )

  # Samples x taxa
  otu <- as(otu_table(ps_ra), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps_ra)) otu <- t(otu)
  mode(otu) <- "numeric"

  meta <- as(sample_data(ps_ra), "data.frame")

  bray <- vegan::vegdist(otu, method = "bray")

  out <- lapply(outcomes, function(y) {
    if (!(y %in% names(meta))) return(NULL)

    df <- meta %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        outcome_raw = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.data[[y]]))),
        outcome_z = as.numeric(scale(outcome_raw))
      )

    need <- c("outcome_z", covars)
    need <- need[need %in% names(df)]

    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(need)) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na()

    ids <- intersect(rownames(df), attr(bray, "Labels"))
    if (length(ids) < 20) return(NULL)

    df <- df[ids, , drop = FALSE]
    br <- as.dist(as.matrix(bray)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])

    cov_use <- covars[covars %in% names(df)]
    cov_use <- cov_use[vapply(cov_use, function(v) {
      x <- df[[v]]
      x <- x[!is.na(x)]
      if (!length(x)) return(FALSE)
      if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
      length(unique(x)) > 1
    }, logical(1))]

    rhs <- c("outcome_z", cov_use)
    fml <- stats::as.formula(
      paste("br ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + "))
    )

    fit <- tryCatch(
      vegan::adonis2(fml, data = df, permutations = perms, by = "margin"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
    if (!("outcome_z" %in% rownames(fit))) return(NULL)

    tibble::tibble(
      niche = niche_keep,
      outcome = y,
      n_used = length(ids),
      R2 = fit["outcome_z", "R2"],
      F = fit["outcome_z", "F"],
      p = fit["outcome_z", "Pr(>F)"]
    )
  })

  res <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)

  if (nrow(res) > 0) {
    res <- res %>%
      dplyr::mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH"))
  }

  res
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Run PERMANOVA
# ------------------------------------------------------------
res_np <- run_permanova_niche(ps_rq1, "NP", lung_outcomes, covars_adj, perms)
res_op <- run_permanova_niche(ps_rq1, "OP", lung_outcomes, covars_adj, perms)

res_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(res_np, res_op) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = dplyr::if_else(grepl("^delta_", outcome), "delta", "T1")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(niche, group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

print(res_all)

write.csv(
  res_all,
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Beta_diversity/RQ1_PERMANOVA_T0composition_vs_T1lung_byNiche.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Plot results
# ------------------------------------------------------------
pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1" = "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC_pred_T1" = "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1" = "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF_pred_T1" = "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "delta_FEV1_pred" = "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FVC_pred" = "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred" = "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_MMEF_pred" = "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)

desired_outcome_order <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)

q_lung_sig_thresh <- 0.25

nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) {
  step * ceiling(x / step)
}

plot_df <- res_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(outcome, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = outcome),
    outcome_f = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_outcome_order)),
    niche_f = factor(niche, levels = c("NP", "OP")),
    fill_q = factor(
      dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q) & q <= q_lung_sig_thresh, "q ≤ 0.25", "ns"),
      levels = c("ns", "q ≤ 0.25")
    ),
    stars_q = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(q)  ~ "",
      q <= 0.05 ~ "***",
      q <= 0.10 ~ "**",
      q <= 0.25 ~ "*",
      TRUE      ~ ""
    )
  )

xlim_all <- nice_ceiling(max(plot_df$R2, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
if (!is.finite(xlim_all) || xlim_all <= 0) xlim_all <- 0.01

stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(
  stars_level = factor(c("*", "**", "***"), levels = c("*", "**", "***")),
  x = 0,
  y = 0
)

p <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_df, ggplot2::aes(x = R2 * 100, y = outcome_f, fill = fill_q)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = dplyr::filter(plot_df, stars_q != ""),
    ggplot2::aes(x = pmax((R2 * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = outcome_f, label = stars_q),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "white",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.2,
    vjust = 0.6
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(
    cols = ggplot2::vars(niche_f),
    scales = "free_y",
    space = "free_y",
    drop = FALSE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, xlim_all * 100),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("ns" = "grey30", "q ≤ 0.25" = "#F28E2B"),
    labels = c("Non-significant", "Significant (q ≤ 0.25)"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Explained variance (% R²)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "RQ1: T0 microbiome composition vs T1 lung function (PERMANOVA; adjusted)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4)
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = stars_legend_df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0,
    size = 0,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
    labels = c(
      "*" = "* q ≤ 0.25",
      "**" = "** q ≤ 0.10",
      "***" = "*** q ≤ 0.05"
    ),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(
    fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)
  ) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Beta_diversity/T0composition_vs_T1lung_barplot.svg",
  p,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```
## Fixed multivar perm
```{r}
# ============================================================
# RQ1: Multivariable PERMANOVA
# T0 microbiome composition vs T1 lung function / lung function change
# ============================================================

perms <- 999
set.seed(202501)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Read RQ1 phyloseq object
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps_rq1 <- readRDS("../Output/Longitudinal/Phyloseq/ps_RQ1_T0micro_LFboth.rds")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Clean / harmonise metadata already inside phyloseq
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sd_rq1 <- as(sample_data(ps_rq1), "data.frame") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    age_T0 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(age_T0))),

    FEV1_pred_T1 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1_pred_T1))),
    FVC_pred_T1 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FVC_pred_T1))),
    FEV1FVC_pred_T1 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1FVC_pred_T1))),
    MMEF_pred_T1 = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(MMEF_pred_T1))),

    delta_FEV1_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FEV1_pred))),
    delta_FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FVC_pred))),
    delta_FEV1FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_FEV1FVC_pred))),
    delta_MMEF_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(delta_MMEF_pred))),

    gender_T0 = factor(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(gender_T0))),
    smoke_status_T0 = factor(
      tolower(as.character(smoke_status_T0)),
      levels = c("non", "former", "current"),
      ordered = TRUE
    ),
    season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
      levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  )

sample_data(ps_rq1) <- sample_data(sd_rq1)

# Variables for PERMANOVA
lung_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

covars_adj <- c(
  "age_T0",
  "gender_T0",
  "smoke_status_T0",
  "season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Main runner for one niche
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_permanova_niche <- function(ps_obj, niche_keep, outcomes, covars, perms = 999) {

  sd0 <- as(sample_data(ps_obj), "data.frame")
  keep_samp <- as.character(sd0$niche) == niche_keep

  ps_n <- prune_samples(keep_samp, ps_obj)
  ps_n <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_n) > 0, ps_n)

  if (nsamples(ps_n) < 2) return(tibble::tibble())

  # Relative abundance
  ps_ra <- transform_sample_counts(
    ps_n,
    function(x) if (sum(x) == 0) x else x / sum(x)
  )

  # Samples x taxa matrix
  otu <- as(otu_table(ps_ra), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps_ra)) otu <- t(otu)
  mode(otu) <- "numeric"

  meta <- as(sample_data(ps_ra), "data.frame")
  bray <- vegan::vegdist(otu, method = "bray")

  out <- lapply(outcomes, function(y) {

    if (!(y %in% names(meta))) return(NULL)

    df <- meta %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        outcome_raw = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.data[[y]]))),
        outcome_z = as.numeric(scale(outcome_raw))
      )

    need <- c("outcome_z", covars)
    need <- need[need %in% names(df)]

    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(need)) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na()

    ids <- intersect(rownames(df), attr(bray, "Labels"))
    if (length(ids) < 20) return(NULL)

    df <- df[ids, , drop = FALSE]
    br <- as.dist(as.matrix(bray)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])

    cov_use <- covars[covars %in% names(df)]
    cov_use <- cov_use[vapply(cov_use, function(v) {
      x <- df[[v]]
      x <- x[!is.na(x)]
      if (!length(x)) return(FALSE)
      if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
      length(unique(x)) > 1
    }, logical(1))]

    rhs <- c("outcome_z", cov_use)

    fml <- stats::as.formula(
      paste("br ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + "))
    )

    fit <- tryCatch(
      vegan::adonis2(fml, data = df, permutations = perms, by = "margin"),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
    if (!("outcome_z" %in% rownames(fit))) return(NULL)

    tibble::tibble(
      niche = niche_keep,
      outcome = y,
      n_used = length(ids),
      R2 = fit["outcome_z", "R2"],
      F = fit["outcome_z", "F"],
      p = fit["outcome_z", "Pr(>F)"]
    )
  })

  res <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)

  if (nrow(res) > 0) {
    res <- res %>%
      dplyr::mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH"))
  }

  res
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Run PERMANOVA
# ------------------------------------------------------------
res_np <- run_permanova_niche(ps_rq1, "NP", lung_outcomes, covars_adj, perms)
res_op <- run_permanova_niche(ps_rq1, "OP", lung_outcomes, covars_adj, perms)

res_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(res_np, res_op) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    group = dplyr::if_else(grepl("^delta_", outcome), "delta", "T1")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(niche, group) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(q = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

print(res_all)

write.csv(
  res_all,
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Beta_diversity/RQ1_PERMANOVA_T0composition_vs_T1lung_byNiche.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

# Plot results — keep original look
pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1" = "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC_pred_T1" = "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1" = "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF_pred_T1" = "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "delta_FEV1_pred" = "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FVC_pred" = "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred" = "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "delta_MMEF_pred" = "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)

desired_outcome_order <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)

q_lung_sig_thresh <- 0.25

nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)

plot_df <- res_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(outcome, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = outcome),
    outcome_f   = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_outcome_order)),
    niche_f     = factor(niche, levels = c("NP", "OP")),
    fill_q      = factor(
      dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q) & q <= q_lung_sig_thresh, "q ≤ 0.25", "ns"),
      levels = c("ns", "q ≤ 0.25")
    ),
    stars_q     = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(q)   ~ "",
      q <= 0.05  ~ "***",
      q <= 0.10  ~ "**",
      q <= 0.25  ~ "*",
      TRUE       ~ ""
    ),
    label_inside = stars_q
  )

# x-limit
xlim_all <- nice_ceiling(max(plot_df$R2, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
if (!is.finite(xlim_all) || xlim_all <= 0) xlim_all <- 0.01

# dummy df to force a "Significance" legend
stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(
  stars_level = factor(c("*", "**", "***"), levels = c("*", "**", "***")),
  x = 0,
  y = 0
)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = R2 * 100, y = outcome_f, fill = fill_q)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    data = dplyr::filter(plot_df, label_inside != ""),
    aes(x = pmax((R2 * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = outcome_f, label = label_inside),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "white",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.2,
    vjust = 0.6
  ) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(niche_f), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, xlim_all * 100),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("ns" = "grey30", "q ≤ 0.25" = "#F28E2B"),
    labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (q ≤ 0.25)"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Explained variance (% R²)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "RQ1: T0 microbiome composition vs T1 lung function (PERMANOVA; adjusted)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin        = margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4)
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = stars_legend_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0,
    size = 0,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
    labels = c(
      "*" = "* q ≤ 0.25",
      "**" = "** q ≤ 0.10",
      "***" = "*** q ≤ 0.05"
    ),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(order = 1),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

ggsave(
  "../Output/Longitudinal/Beta_diversity/T0composition_vs_T1lung_barplot.svg",
  p,
  width = 7,
  height = 4
)
```


## PCoAs
```{r}
# helper
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

make_pretty_pcoa_cat <- function(ps, group_var,
                                 covars = NULL,
                                 group_levels = NULL,
                                 pretty_map = NULL,
                                 colors = NULL,   # <-- pass in call
                                 shapes = NULL,   # <-- optional
                                 title = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis",
                                 legend_title = NULL,
                                 perms = 999, seed = 202501) {

  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))

  meta <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta)

  if (!group_var %in% names(meta)) stop(sprintf("'%s' not in metadata.", group_var))

  # coerce grouping var
  meta[[group_var]] <- as.character(meta[[group_var]])
  if (!is.null(group_levels)) meta[[group_var]][!meta[[group_var]] %in% group_levels] <- NA
  meta[[group_var]] <- factor(meta[[group_var]],
                              levels = group_levels %||% sort(unique(meta[[group_var]])))

  # complete cases for group (+ covars if adjusted)
  needed <- c(group_var, covars)
  meta_cc <- meta %>% tidyr::drop_na(dplyr::all_of(needed))

  ps_cc <- prune_samples(meta_cc$sample_id, ps)
  if (nsamples(ps_cc) < 3) stop("Too few samples after pruning.")

  # distance + align
  dist_bc <- phyloseq::distance(ps_cc, method = "bray")
  ids <- intersect(attr(dist_bc, "Labels"), rownames(meta_cc))
  dist_bc <- as.dist(as.matrix(dist_bc)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
  meta_cc <- meta_cc[ids, , drop = FALSE]

  # drop singleton levels
  tab <- table(meta_cc[[group_var]])
  keep_lv <- names(tab)[tab >= 2]
  meta_cc <- meta_cc[meta_cc[[group_var]] %in% keep_lv, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_cc[[group_var]] <- droplevels(meta_cc[[group_var]])
  dist_bc <- as.dist(as.matrix(dist_bc)[rownames(meta_cc), rownames(meta_cc), drop = FALSE])

  if (nlevels(meta_cc[[group_var]]) < 2) stop("Need at least 2 groups.")

  # PERMANOVA
  form <- reformulate(c(group_var, covars), response = "dist_bc")
  set.seed(seed)
  fit <- vegan::adonis2(form, data = meta_cc, permutations = perms, by = "margin")
  aov_tbl <- as.data.frame(fit); aov_tbl$term <- rownames(aov_tbl)

  row_term <- aov_tbl[aov_tbl$term == group_var, , drop = FALSE]
  R2_val <- if (nrow(row_term)) row_term$R2[1] else NA_real_
  p_val  <- if (nrow(row_term)) row_term$`Pr(>F)`[1] else NA_real_

  sig <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p_val)  ~ "",
    p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p_val < 0.01  ~ "**",
    p_val < 0.05  ~ "*",
    TRUE          ~ ""
  )

  lab_str <- sprintf("PERMANOVA%s\n%s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3g %s",
                     ifelse(is.null(covars), " (univariable)", " (adjusted)"),
                     ifelse(is.null(legend_title), group_var, legend_title),
                     R2_val, p_val, sig)

  # PCoA
  pco <- ape::pcoa(dist_bc)
  ax1_var <- round(100 * pco$values$Relative_eig[1], 1)
  ax2_var <- round(100 * pco$values$Relative_eig[2], 1)

  scr <- as.data.frame(pco$vectors[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
  colnames(scr) <- c("PCoA1","PCoA2")
  scr$sample_id <- rownames(scr)

  df <- dplyr::left_join(scr, meta_cc, by = "sample_id")

  surv_lv <- levels(df[[group_var]])
  if (is.null(pretty_map)) pretty_map <- setNames(surv_lv, surv_lv)

  df$group_plot <- factor(as.character(df[[group_var]]),
                          levels = surv_lv,
                          labels = unname(pretty_map[surv_lv]))

  # colors: use what you pass; otherwise default ggplot hues
  if (is.null(colors)) {
    colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(surv_lv)), surv_lv)
  } else {
    # allow unnamed vector; assume order matches levels
    if (is.null(names(colors))) colors <- setNames(colors, surv_lv)
  }

  # shapes: binary gets circle/triangle; multi-level all circles unless you pass shapes
  if (is.null(shapes)) {
    if (length(surv_lv) == 2) shapes <- setNames(c(16,17), surv_lv)
    else shapes <- setNames(rep(16, length(surv_lv)), surv_lv)
  } else {
    if (is.null(names(shapes))) shapes <- setNames(shapes, surv_lv)
  }

  # ellipses only if >=3 per group
  cnt <- table(df$group_plot)
  can_ell <- length(cnt) > 1 && all(cnt >= 3)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(PCoA1, PCoA2,
                      color = .data[[group_var]],
                      shape = .data[[group_var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors, aesthetics = "colour") +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = colors, aesthetics = "fill") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shapes) +
    { if (can_ell)
      stat_ellipse(aes(fill = .data[[group_var]], color = .data[[group_var]]),
                   type = "t", level = 0.95, size = 1,
                   geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1,
                   show.legend = FALSE)
    } +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = paste0("PCoA1 (", ax1_var, "%)"),
      y = paste0("PCoA2 (", ax2_var, "%)"),
      color = ifelse(is.null(legend_title), group_var, legend_title)
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = lab_str,
             hjust = 1.05, vjust = -0.2, size = 4, color = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
      legend.position = "right", 
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
axis.text  = element_text(size = 13)
    ) +
    guides(
      fill  = "none",
      shape = "none",
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
        shape = unname(shapes[surv_lv]),
        linetype = 0, fill = NA, alpha = 1, size = 3
      ))
    )

  attr(p, "permanova") <- fit
  return(p)
}

out_dir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/Beta_diversity/Ordinations"

# Niche - NP vs OP
OPvsNP_PCoA <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_rq1,
  group_var    = "niche",
  colors       = c("#7987AF","#7c674d"), 
  title        = "PCoA — Niche (VGO3 NP vs OP)",
  legend_title = "Niche (OP vs NP)"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "Niche_OPvsNP_PCoA2.svg"), OPvsNP_PCoA, width=7, height=5)

```
# Differential abundance analysis
## Preprocessing
```{r}
# These ps objects are already filtered and converted to RA
T0_NP_filtered
T0_OP_filtered

# Quick counts
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(T0_NP_filtered))$ASV))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(T0_NP_filtered))$Genus))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(T0_OP_filtered))$ASV))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(T0_OP_filtered))$Genus))


## Convert ASV RA -> "absolute" abundance via qPCR 

# Helper functions
otu_tab_to_df <- function(ps) {
  otu <- as(phyloseq::otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(ps)) otu <- t(otu)
  otu <- as.data.frame(otu, check.names = FALSE)
  otu <- tibble::rownames_to_column(otu, "sample_id")
  otu
}

meta_to_df <- function(ps, sample_name = "sample_id") {
  meta <- as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta <- tibble::rownames_to_column(meta, sample_name)
  meta
}

#### T0 NP ####
t0_np_otu  <- otu_tab_to_df(T0_NP_filtered)
t0_np_meta <- meta_to_df(T0_NP_filtered, sample_name = "sample_id")

t0_np_otu <- t0_np_otu %>%
  dplyr::left_join(t0_np_meta[, c("sample_id", "qPCR")], by = "sample_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(qPCR = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(qPCR)))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-c(sample_id, qPCR), ~ .x * qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-qPCR) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(t0_np_otu) <- t0_np_otu$sample_id
t0_np_otu <- t0_np_otu[, -1] %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

t0_np_ps_abs <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(as.matrix(t0_np_otu), taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(T0_NP_filtered),
  sample_data(prune_samples(colnames(t0_np_otu), T0_NP_filtered))
)

t0_np_ps_abs <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(t0_np_ps_abs) > 0, t0_np_ps_abs)

#### T0 OP ####
t0_op_otu  <- otu_tab_to_df(T0_OP_filtered)
t0_op_meta <- meta_to_df(T0_OP_filtered, sample_name = "sample_id")

t0_op_otu <- t0_op_otu %>%
  dplyr::left_join(t0_op_meta[, c("sample_id", "qPCR")], by = "sample_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(qPCR = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(qPCR)))) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-c(sample_id, qPCR), ~ .x * qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-qPCR) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(t0_op_otu) <- t0_op_otu$sample_id
t0_op_otu <- t0_op_otu[, -1] %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

t0_op_ps_abs <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(as.matrix(t0_op_otu), taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(T0_OP_filtered),
  sample_data(prune_samples(colnames(t0_op_otu), T0_OP_filtered))
)

t0_op_ps_abs <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(t0_op_ps_abs) > 0, t0_op_ps_abs)

## Agglomerate absolute phyloseqs to Genus level

set_genus_names <- function(ps) {
  tt <- as(phyloseq::tax_table(ps), "matrix")

  genus_col <- colnames(tt)[tolower(colnames(tt)) == "genus"]
  if (length(genus_col) == 0) stop("No Genus column found in tax_table.")

  g <- as.character(tt[, genus_col[1]])
  missing_idx <- is.na(g) | g == ""
  g[missing_idx] <- paste0("Unclassified_Genus_", seq_len(sum(missing_idx)))

  if (any(duplicated(g))) {
    dup <- duplicated(g) | duplicated(g, fromLast = TRUE)
    g[dup] <- paste0(g[dup], "_", ave(seq_along(g[dup]), g[dup], FUN = seq_along))
  }

  taxa_names(ps) <- g
  ps
}

t0_np_ps_genus_abs <- t0_np_ps_abs %>% tax_glom(taxrank = "genus") %>% set_genus_names()
t0_op_ps_genus_abs <- t0_op_ps_abs %>% tax_glom(taxrank = "genus") %>% set_genus_names()



rel_thresh <- 0.005
prev_frac  <- 0.10

# Helper: apply RA-based prevalence filter, return ABS pruned
filter_abs_by_RA_rule <- function(ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac) {
  ps_ra <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(ps_abs, function(x) {
    s <- sum(x)
    if (s == 0) x else x / s
  })

  ns <- phyloseq::nsamples(ps_ra)
  need <- ceiling(ns * prev_frac)

  otu <- as(otu_table(ps_ra), "matrix")
  if (!taxa_are_rows(ps_ra)) otu <- t(otu)

  keep_taxa <- rownames(otu)[rowSums(otu >= rel_thresh) >= need]
  phyloseq::prune_taxa(keep_taxa, ps_abs)
}

#### ASV level ####
t0_np_ps_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(t0_np_ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)
t0_op_ps_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(t0_op_ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)

#### Genus level ####
t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(t0_np_ps_genus_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)
t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(t0_op_ps_genus_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)

# Per-niche lists
ps_list_DA_ASV <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_abs_filt
)

ps_list_DA_genus <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt
)

cat("\n=== Longitudinal T0 NP ===\n")
cat("RA object samples:", nsamples(T0_NP_filtered), "\n") # 95
cat("ABS object samples:", nsamples(t0_np_ps_abs), "\n") # 95
cat("ASV filtered samples:", nsamples(t0_np_ps_abs_filt), "\n") # 95
cat("ASV filtered taxa:", ntaxa(t0_np_ps_abs_filt), "\n") # 27
cat("Genus filtered taxa:", ntaxa(t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt), "\n") # 24

cat("\n=== Longitudinal T0 OP ===\n")
cat("RA object samples:", nsamples(T0_OP_filtered), "\n") # 73
cat("ABS object samples:", nsamples(t0_op_ps_abs), "\n")# 73
cat("ASV filtered samples:", nsamples(t0_op_ps_abs_filt), "\n")# 73
cat("ASV filtered taxa:", ntaxa(t0_op_ps_abs_filt), "\n") # 48 
cat("Genus filtered taxa:", ntaxa(t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt), "\n") # 23

cat("\n=== Metadata columns available for DAA ===\n")
print(colnames(as(sample_data(t0_np_ps_abs_filt), "data.frame")))
```

## MaAsLin2
```{r}

# Differential abundance analysis – MaAsLin2 (Longitudinal)
# Outcomes: T1 lung function + Delta lung function

outcomes_raw <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1", "FVC_pred_T1", "FEV1FVC_pred_T1", "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred", "delta_FVC_pred", "delta_FEV1FVC_pred", "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

covariates <- c(
  "age_T0",
  "gender_T0",
  "smoke_status_T0",
  "season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)

safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
out_root  <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin2"

run_maaslin2_longitudinal <- function(ps, outcome_var, covariates, out_dir,
                                      min_n = 10, verbose = TRUE) {
  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))

  meta0 <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)

  if (!outcome_var %in% colnames(meta0)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] outcome missing: ", outcome_var)
    return(NULL)
  }

  miss_cov <- setdiff(covariates, colnames(meta0))
  if (length(miss_cov)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] missing covariates: ", paste(miss_cov, collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta0[[outcome_var]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta0[[outcome_var]])))

  if ("age_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$age_T0 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta0$age_T0)))
  }

  if ("gender_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$gender_T0 <- factor(stringr::str_to_title(as.character(meta0$gender_T0)))
  }

  if ("smoke_status_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$smoke_status_T0 <- factor(
      tolower(as.character(meta0$smoke_status_T0)),
      levels = c("non", "former", "current"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  if ("season_microbiome_sampling_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$season_microbiome_sampling_T0 <- factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(meta0$season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
      levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  need <- c(outcome_var, covariates)
  keep <- stats::complete.cases(meta0[, need, drop = FALSE])

  if (verbose) {
    message("  outcome non-NA: ", sum(!is.na(meta0[[outcome_var]])), "/", nrow(meta0),
            " | complete cases: ", sum(keep), "/", nrow(meta0))
  }

  ps2 <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep, ps)
  if (phyloseq::nsamples(ps2) < min_n) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] too few samples after filtering: n=", phyloseq::nsamples(ps2))
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta_df <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps2), check.names = FALSE)

  otu <- as(phyloseq::otu_table(ps2), "matrix")
  if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(ps2)) otu <- t(otu)
  otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu, check.names = FALSE)

  common <- intersect(rownames(meta_df), rownames(otu_df))
  meta_df <- meta_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
  otu_df  <- otu_df[common, , drop = FALSE]

  if (!identical(rownames(meta_df), rownames(otu_df))) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] rowname mismatch after alignment")
    return(NULL)
  }

  if (verbose) {
    message("  running MaAsLin2: n=", nrow(meta_df), " | features=", ncol(otu_df))
  }

  fit <- Maaslin2::Maaslin2(
    input_data     = otu_df,
    input_metadata = meta_df,
    output         = out_dir,
    fixed_effects  = c(outcome_var, covariates),
    normalization  = "NONE",
    transform      = "LOG",
    min_abundance  = 0,
    min_prevalence = 0,
    plot_heatmap   = FALSE,
    plot_scatter   = FALSE
  )

  res <- fit$results
  if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [EMPTY] fit$results empty")
    return(NULL)
  }

  res <- res[res$metadata == outcome_var, , drop = FALSE]
  if (!nrow(res)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [EMPTY] no rows for metadata==", outcome_var)
    return(NULL)
  }

  res$outcome <- outcome_var
  res$conf.low  <- res$coef - 1.96 * res$stderr
  res$conf.high <- res$coef + 1.96 * res$stderr
  res$label <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(res$qval)  ~ NA_character_,
    res$qval <= 0.05 ~ "***",
    res$qval <= 0.10 ~ "**",
    res$qval <= 0.25 ~ "*",
    TRUE             ~ NA_character_
  )

  res
}

run_all_maaslin_models <- function(ps_lists, outcomes, covars, out_root, min_n = 10) {
  results_all <- list()

  for (level in names(ps_lists)) {
    for (niche in names(ps_lists[[level]])) {
      ps <- ps_lists[[level]][[niche]]
      if (is.null(ps)) next

      for (v in outcomes) {
        subdir <- file.path(out_root, niche, level)
        dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

        out_dir <- file.path(subdir, safe_name(v))
        dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

        message("Running: ", niche, " | ", level, " | ", v)

        res <- tryCatch(
          run_maaslin2_longitudinal(ps, v, covars, out_dir, min_n = min_n, verbose = TRUE),
          error = function(e) {
            message("  [ERROR] ", conditionMessage(e))
            return(NULL)
          }
        )

        if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) next

        res$niche <- niche
        res$level <- level
        results_all[[paste(niche, level, v, sep = "_")]] <- res

        fn <- paste0(niche, "_", level, "_", safe_name(v), ".csv")
        readr::write_csv(res, file.path(subdir, fn))
      }
    }
  }

  res_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_all)
  readr::write_csv(res_df, file.path(out_root, "MaAsLin2_all_results_summary.csv"))
  res_df
}

# Use the NEW filtered absolute-abundance objects
ps_list_DA_ASV <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_abs_filt
)

ps_list_DA_genus <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt
)

ps_lists_longitudinal <- list(
  ASV   = ps_list_DA_ASV,
  Genus = ps_list_DA_genus
)

maaslin_results_longitudinal <- run_all_maaslin_models(
  ps_lists = ps_lists_longitudinal,
  outcomes = outcomes_raw,
  covars   = covariates,
  out_root = out_root,
  min_n    = 10
)

```
### MaAsLin2 heatmaps
```{r}

root_dir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin2"
summary_file <- file.path(root_dir, "MaAsLin2_all_results_summary.csv")

# Raw metadata names
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1","FVC_pred_T1","FEV1FVC_pred_T1","MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred","delta_FVC_pred","delta_FEV1FVC_pred","delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 (T1)","FVC (T1)","FEV1/FVC (T1)","MMEF (T1)",
  "ΔFEV1 (T1–T0)","ΔFVC (T1–T0)","ΔFEV1/FVC (T1–T0)","ΔMMEF (T1–T0)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order

# Read once
df_all <- readr::read_csv(summary_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Ensure we have a label column (stars)
df_all <- df_all %>%
  mutate(
    metadata = trimws(as.character(metadata)),
    label = case_when(
      !is.na(qval) & qval <= 0.05 ~ "***",
      !is.na(qval) & qval <= 0.10 ~ "**",
      !is.na(qval) & qval <= 0.25 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(metadata %in% custom_metadata_order)

# Helper label formatters (y-axis)
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      metadata_raw  = factor(metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order),
      metadata_plot = factor(pretty_labels[as.character(metadata_raw)],
                             levels = unname(pretty_labels[custom_metadata_order]))
    )

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "Coefficient\n(taxa ↑ as lung ↑)"
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = grid::unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}

# If your niche names are exactly "T0_NP" and "T0_OP", keep these.
# If they are "NP"/"OP" instead, change below accordingly.
niche_np <- "T0_NP"
niche_op <- "T0_OP"

# Build plots
p_T0_NP_ASV <- make_heatmap(df_all %>% filter(level == "ASV",   niche == niche_np), "T0 NP (ASV)",   "ASV")
p_T0_OP_ASV <- make_heatmap(df_all %>% filter(level == "ASV",   niche == niche_op), "T0 OP (ASV)",   "ASV")
p_T0_NP_Gen <- make_heatmap(df_all %>% filter(level == "Genus", niche == niche_np), "T0 NP (Genus)", "Genus")
p_T0_OP_Gen <- make_heatmap(df_all %>% filter(level == "Genus", niche == niche_op), "T0 OP (Genus)", "Genus")

asv_grid   <- p_T0_NP_ASV | p_T0_OP_ASV
genus_grid <- p_T0_NP_Gen | p_T0_OP_Gen

ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_ASV.svg"),
       asv_grid, width = 11, height = 8)

ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_Genus.svg"),
       genus_grid, width = 11, height = 8)



# Only showing significant results
root_dir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin2"
summary_file <- file.path(root_dir, "MaAsLin2_all_results_summary.csv")

# Order of outcomes on x-axis
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1","FVC_pred_T1","FEV1FVC_pred_T1","MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred","delta_FVC_pred","delta_FEV1FVC_pred","delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 (T1)","FVC (T1)","FEV1/FVC (T1)","MMEF (T1)",
  "ΔFEV1 (T1–T0)","ΔFVC (T1–T0)","ΔFEV1/FVC (T1–T0)","ΔMMEF (T1–T0)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order

# ---- label formatters ----
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# ---- reader from summary, returning a "complete grid" ----
read_heatmap_from_summary <- function(df_all, niche_value, level_value) {

  df <- df_all %>%
    mutate(
      metadata = trimws(as.character(metadata)),
      feature  = as.character(feature),
      label    = if ("label" %in% names(.)) as.character(label) else NA_character_
    ) %>%
    filter(
      niche == niche_value,
      level == level_value,
      metadata %in% custom_metadata_order
    ) %>%
    select(feature, metadata, coef, qval, label)

  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  # KEY PART: keep features that have a non-NA label anywhere (in this niche+level panel)
  keep_features <- df %>%
```
