```{r}
    filter(!is.na(label) & label != "") %>%
    distinct(feature) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df <- df %>% filter(feature %in% keep_features)
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  # Make sure every kept feature appears for every metadata column (keep "whole row")
  df <- df %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      feature,
      metadata = custom_metadata_order,
      fill = list(coef = NA_real_, qval = NA_real_, label = NA_character_)
    )

  # X-axis mapping
  df$metadata_raw  <- factor(df$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  df$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(df$metadata_raw)],
                             levels = unname(pretty_labels[custom_metadata_order]))

  # Optional y ordering: features with "best evidence" (smallest q) appear at top
  feat_order <- df %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    summarise(best_q = suppressWarnings(min(qval, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(best_q = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q), NA_real_, best_q)) %>%
    arrange(best_q) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df$feature <- factor(df$feature, levels = rev(feat_order))

  df
}

# ---- plotter ----
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no taxa with labels)")))
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "Coefficient\n(taxa ↑ as lung ↑)"
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = grid::unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}

# ---- read summary once ----
df_all <- readr::read_csv(summary_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Set these to match the niche strings in your summary
# (often "T0_NP"/"T0_OP", but check with unique(df_all$niche))
niche_np <- "T0_NP"
niche_op <- "T0_OP"

# Build heatmaps: keep only taxa with ANY non-NA label, but keep full rows across outcomes
p_T0_NP_ASV <- make_heatmap(
  read_heatmap_from_summary(df_all, niche_np, "ASV"),
  "T0 NP (ASV) — taxa with labels anywhere", "ASV"
)
p_T0_OP_ASV <- make_heatmap(
  read_heatmap_from_summary(df_all, niche_op, "ASV"),
  "T0 OP (ASV) — taxa with labels anywhere", "ASV"
)

p_T0_NP_Gen <- make_heatmap(
  read_heatmap_from_summary(df_all, niche_np, "Genus"),
  "T0 NP (Genus) — taxa with labels anywhere", "Genus"
)
p_T0_OP_Gen <- make_heatmap(
  read_heatmap_from_summary(df_all, niche_op, "Genus"),
  "T0 OP (Genus) — taxa with labels anywhere", "Genus"
)

asv_grid   <- p_T0_NP_ASV | p_T0_OP_ASV
genus_grid <- p_T0_NP_Gen | p_T0_OP_Gen

ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_ASV_sig.svg"),
       asv_grid, width = 10, height = 2.8)
ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_Genus_sig.svg"),
       genus_grid, width = 7, height = 2)
```

## ANCOMBC2 
```{r}
## ANCOMBC2 (Longitudinal) — RAW lung function direction
# Make TreeSummarizedExperiment data
T0_np_asv_tse   <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(T0_np_ps_abs_filt)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(T0_op_ps_abs_filt)
T0_np_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(T0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt)
T0_op_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(T0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt)

# Ensure covariate factor levels are correct
fix_factors <- function(tse) {
  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)

  cd$gender_T0 <- factor(tolower(as.character(cd$gender_T0)),
                         levels = c("male", "female"))

  cd$season_microbiome_sampling_T0 <- factor(as.character(cd$season_microbiome_sampling_T0),
                                          levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"))

  cd$smoke_status_T0 <- factor(tolower(as.character(cd$smoke_status_T0)),
                               levels = c("non","former","current"), ordered = TRUE)

  # numeric
  cd$age_T0 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(cd$age_T0)))

  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

T0_np_asv_tse   <- fix_factors(T0_np_asv_tse)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- fix_factors(T0_op_asv_tse)
T0_np_genus_tse <- fix_factors(T0_np_genus_tse)
T0_op_genus_tse <- fix_factors(T0_op_genus_tse)

# Set reference levels (NOTE: your refs list had a typo "gender_0" -> "gender_T0")
refs <- list(
  gender_T0 = "male",
  season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = "Winter"
)

relevel_tse <- function(tse, refs) {
  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)
  for (nm in names(refs)) {
    if (nm %in% names(cd)) {
      cd[[nm]] <- stats::relevel(factor(cd[[nm]]), ref = refs[[nm]])
    }
  }
  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

T0_np_asv_tse   <- relevel_tse(T0_np_asv_tse, refs)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- relevel_tse(T0_op_asv_tse, refs)
T0_np_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(T0_np_genus_tse, refs)
T0_op_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(T0_op_genus_tse, refs)

# Models using RAW outcomes (no decline variables)
models <- list(
  FEV1         = "FEV1_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  FVC          = "FVC_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  FEV1FVC      = "FEV1FVC_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  MMEF         = "MMEF_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FEV1   = "delta_FEV1_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FVC    = "delta_FVC_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FEV1FVC= "delta_FEV1FVC_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_MMEF   = "delta_MMEF_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)

# Output dirs
root_ancom <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/ANCOMBC2"
dir.create(root_ancom, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

save_ancom_list <- function(ancom_list, output_dir, prefix, file_suffixes) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # round numeric columns for readability (optional)
  ancom_res <- purrr::map(ancom_list, ~ dplyr::mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, ~ round(.x, 3)))

  purrr::walk2(ancom_res, file_suffixes, ~ readr::write_csv(.x,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(prefix, "_", .y, ".csv"))
  ))
  invisible(ancom_res)
}

file_names <- c("FEV1","FVC","FEV1FVC","MMEF","Delta_FEV1","Delta_FVC","Delta_FEV1FVC","Delta_MMEF")

run_ancom_for_tse <- function(tse, models) {
  purrr::map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
    data         = tse,
    fix_formula  = .x,
    rand_formula = NULL,
    p_adj_method = "BH",
    prv_cut      = 0,
    lib_cut      = 0,
    struc_zero   = FALSE,
    alpha        = 0.05,
    global       = FALSE,
    pairwise     = FALSE
  ))
}

## NP ASV
ancom_np_asv <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_np_asv_tse, models)
save_ancom_list(ancom_np_asv,
                output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "ASV"),
                prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV",
                file_suffixes = file_names)

## OP ASV
ancom_op_asv <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_op_asv_tse, models)
save_ancom_list(ancom_op_asv,
                output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "ASV"),
                prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV",
                file_suffixes = file_names)

## NP Genus
ancom_np_genus <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_np_genus_tse, models)
save_ancom_list(ancom_np_genus,
                output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "Genus"),
                prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_Genus",
                file_suffixes = file_names)

## OP Genus
ancom_op_genus <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_op_genus_tse, models)
save_ancom_list(ancom_op_genus,
                output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "Genus"),
                prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_Genus",
                file_suffixes = file_names)

```

# ANCOM-BC2 (updated)
```{r}
## ANCOMBC2 (Longitudinal) — RAW lung function direction

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Create TSE objects (UPDATED OBJECT NAMES)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Use the NEW filtered absolute-abundance objects
T0_np_asv_tse   <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(t0_np_ps_abs_filt)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(t0_op_ps_abs_filt)

T0_np_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt)
T0_op_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt)


# Clean metadata (aligned with your current structure)
fix_factors <- function(tse) {

  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)

  # --- Outcome variables (IMPORTANT)
  outcome_vars <- c(
    "FEV1_pred_T1","FVC_pred_T1","FEV1FVC_pred_T1","MMEF_pred_T1",
    "delta_FEV1_pred","delta_FVC_pred","delta_FEV1FVC_pred","delta_MMEF_pred"
  )

  for (v in outcome_vars) {
    if (v %in% names(cd)) {
      cd[[v]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(cd[[v]])))
    }
  }

  # --- Covariates
  if ("age_T0" %in% names(cd)) {
    cd$age_T0 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(cd$age_T0)))
  }

  if ("gender_T0" %in% names(cd)) {
    cd$gender_T0 <- factor(
      tolower(as.character(cd$gender_T0)),
      levels = c("male", "female")
    )
  }

  if ("smoke_status_T0" %in% names(cd)) {
    cd$smoke_status_T0 <- factor(
      tolower(as.character(cd$smoke_status_T0)),
      levels = c("non","former","current"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  if ("season_microbiome_sampling_T0" %in% names(cd)) {
    cd$season_microbiome_sampling_T0 <- factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(cd$season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
      levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

# Apply
T0_np_asv_tse   <- fix_factors(T0_np_asv_tse)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- fix_factors(T0_op_asv_tse)
T0_np_genus_tse <- fix_factors(T0_np_genus_tse)
T0_op_genus_tse <- fix_factors(T0_op_genus_tse)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Set reference levels (SAFE)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
refs <- list(
  gender_T0 = "male",
  season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = "Winter"
)

relevel_tse <- function(tse, refs) {

  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)

  for (nm in names(refs)) {
    if (nm %in% names(cd)) {
      cd[[nm]] <- stats::relevel(factor(cd[[nm]]), ref = refs[[nm]])
    }
  }

  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

T0_np_asv_tse   <- relevel_tse(T0_np_asv_tse, refs)
T0_op_asv_tse   <- relevel_tse(T0_op_asv_tse, refs)
T0_np_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(T0_np_genus_tse, refs)
T0_op_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(T0_op_genus_tse, refs)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Models (UNCHANGED — already correct)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
models <- list(
  FEV1          = "FEV1_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  FVC           = "FVC_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  FEV1FVC       = "FEV1FVC_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  MMEF          = "MMEF_pred_T1 + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FEV1    = "delta_FEV1_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FVC     = "delta_FVC_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_FEV1FVC = "delta_FEV1FVC_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0",
  Delta_MMEF    = "delta_MMEF_pred + age_T0 + gender_T0 + smoke_status_T0 + season_microbiome_sampling_T0"
)


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Runner (UNCHANGED)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_ancom_for_tse <- function(tse, models) {
  purrr::map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
    data         = tse,
    fix_formula  = .x,
    rand_formula = NULL,
    p_adj_method = "BH",
    prv_cut      = 0,
    lib_cut      = 0,
    struc_zero   = FALSE,
    alpha        = 0.05,
    global       = FALSE,
    pairwise     = FALSE
  ))
}


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Run analyses
# ------------------------------------------------------------
root_ancom <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/ANCOMBC2"
dir.create(root_ancom, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

file_names <- c("FEV1","FVC","FEV1FVC","MMEF","Delta_FEV1","Delta_FVC","Delta_FEV1FVC","Delta_MMEF")

colnames(SummarizedExperiment::colData(T0_np_asv_tse))

## NP ASV
ancom_np_asv <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_np_asv_tse, models)

## OP ASV
ancom_op_asv <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_op_asv_tse, models)

## NP Genus
ancom_np_genus <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_np_genus_tse, models)

## OP Genus
ancom_op_genus <- run_ancom_for_tse(T0_op_genus_tse, models)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. SAVE RESULTS (THIS IS WHAT YOU’RE MISSING)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

save_ancom_list <- function(ancom_list, output_dir, prefix, file_suffixes) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  ancom_res <- purrr::map(ancom_list, ~ dplyr::mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, ~ round(.x, 3)))

  purrr::walk2(ancom_res, file_suffixes, ~ readr::write_csv(
    .x,
    file.path(output_dir, paste0(prefix, "_", .y, ".csv"))
  ))

  invisible(ancom_res)
}

## NP ASV
save_ancom_list(
  ancom_np_asv,
  output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "ASV"),
  prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV",
  file_suffixes = file_names
)

## OP ASV
save_ancom_list(
  ancom_op_asv,
  output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "ASV"),
  prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV",
  file_suffixes = file_names
)

## NP Genus
save_ancom_list(
  ancom_np_genus,
  output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "Genus"),
  prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_Genus",
  file_suffixes = file_names
)

## OP Genus
save_ancom_list(
  ancom_op_genus,
  output_dir = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "Genus"),
  prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_Genus",
  file_suffixes = file_names
)
```
### ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps 
```{r}
## ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps — NP & OP combined, ASV & Genus (RAW direction)

root_ancom <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/ANCOMBC2"
paths <- list(
  NP_ASV   = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "ASV"),
  OP_ASV   = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "ASV"),
  NP_Genus = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "Genus"),
  OP_Genus = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "Genus")
)

lung_vars <- tibble::tribble(
  ~file_suffix,     ~plot_var,         ~model_var,
  "FEV1",           "FEV1",            "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC",            "FVC",             "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC",        "FEV1FVC",         "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF",           "MMEF",            "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "Delta_FEV1",     "Delta_FEV1",      "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "Delta_FVC",      "Delta_FVC",       "delta_FVC_pred",
  "Delta_FEV1FVC",  "Delta_FEV1FVC",   "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "Delta_MMEF",     "Delta_MMEF",      "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  FEV1 = "FEV1",
  FVC = "FVC",
  FEV1FVC = "FEV1/FVC",
  MMEF = "MMEF",
  Delta_FEV1 = "Delta FEV1",
  Delta_FVC = "Delta FVC",
  Delta_FEV1FVC = "Delta FEV1/FVC",
  Delta_MMEF = "Delta MMEF"
)

# Y label formatters
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}
format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# Generic reader (works for NP/OP and ASV/Genus based on prefix)
read_ancom_folder <- function(folder, prefix, lung_vars) {
  all_out <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(lung_vars))) {
    f <- file.path(folder, paste0(prefix, "_", lung_vars$file_suffix[i], ".csv"))
    if (!file.exists(f)) {
      warning("Missing file: ", basename(f))
      next
    }

    df <- readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
    if (!nrow(df)) next

    lfc_col <- paste0("lfc_", lung_vars$model_var[i])
    q_col   <- paste0("q_",   lung_vars$model_var[i])
    ps_col  <- paste0("passed_ss_", lung_vars$model_var[i])

    if (!all(c("taxon", lfc_col, q_col, ps_col) %in% names(df))) {
      warning("Missing expected columns in ", basename(f))
      next
    }

    all_out[[i]] <- tibble::tibble(
      feature   = df$taxon,
      metadata  = lung_vars$plot_var[i],
      coef      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[lfc_col]])),
      q_value   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[q_col]])),
      passed_ss = as.logical(df[[ps_col]]),
      label = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(q_value)  ~ "",
        q_value <= 0.05 ~ "***",
        q_value <= 0.10 ~ "**",
        q_value <= 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE            ~ ""
      )
    )
  }

  d <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_out)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  d$metadata <- factor(d$metadata, levels = names(pretty_labels))
  d$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[d$metadata], levels = pretty_labels)
  d
}

# OPTIONAL: keep only taxa with q<=0.25 in ANY outcome (in that dataset+level)
filter_any_q025 <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(df)
  keep_feats <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(feature) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(any_sig = any(!is.na(q_value) & q_value <= 0.25), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::filter(any_sig) %>%
    dplyr::pull(feature)
  df %>% dplyr::filter(feature %in% keep_feats)
}

make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot2::ggplot() + ggplot2::theme_void() + ggplot2::ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(df, ggplot2::aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      ggplot2::aes(label = label, color = ifelse(passed_ss, "black", "white")),
      size = 4, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_identity() +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
                                  midpoint = 0, name = "LFC") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.title  = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    ggplot2::ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") p + ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  else               p + ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
}

# ---- Read, (optional) filter, plot ----

np_asv   <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_ASV,   prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV",   lung_vars)
op_asv   <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_ASV,   prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV",   lung_vars)
np_genus <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_Genus, prefix = "ANCOMBC2_NP_Genus", lung_vars)
op_genus <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_Genus, prefix = "ANCOMBC2_OP_Genus", lung_vars)

# If you want the same “only taxa significant anywhere” behavior:
np_asv   <- filter_any_q025(np_asv)
op_asv   <- filter_any_q025(op_asv)
np_genus <- filter_any_q025(np_genus)
op_genus <- filter_any_q025(op_genus)

p_np_asv   <- make_heatmap(np_asv,   "T0 NP (ASV)",   "ASV")
p_op_asv   <- make_heatmap(op_asv,   "T0 OP (ASV)",   "ASV")
p_np_genus <- make_heatmap(np_genus, "T0 NP (Genus)", "Genus")
p_op_genus <- make_heatmap(op_genus, "T0 OP (Genus)", "Genus")

p_asv_grid <- (p_np_asv | p_op_asv) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — ASV level (raw lung function)")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_ASV_combined.svg"),
                p_asv_grid, width = 10, height = 8)

p_gen_grid <- (p_np_genus | p_op_genus) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — Genus level (raw lung function)")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_Genus_combined.svg"),
                p_gen_grid, width = 10, height = 8)






#### Only showing significant rows ####
root_ancom <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/ANCOMBC2"
paths <- list(
  NP_ASV   = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "ASV"),
  OP_ASV   = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "ASV"),
  NP_Genus = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "Genus"),
  OP_Genus = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "Genus")
)

lung_vars <- tibble::tribble(
  ~file_suffix,     ~plot_var,         ~model_var,
  "FEV1",           "FEV1",            "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC",            "FVC",             "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC",        "FEV1FVC",         "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF",           "MMEF",            "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "Delta_FEV1",     "Delta_FEV1",      "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "Delta_FVC",      "Delta_FVC",       "delta_FVC_pred",
  "Delta_FEV1FVC",  "Delta_FEV1FVC",   "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "Delta_MMEF",     "Delta_MMEF",      "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  FEV1 = "FEV1 (T1)",
  FVC = "FVC (T1)",
  FEV1FVC = "FEV1/FVC (T1)",
  MMEF = "MMEF (T1)",
  Delta_FEV1 = "ΔFEV1 (T1–T0)",
  Delta_FVC = "ΔFVC (T1–T0)",
  Delta_FEV1FVC = "ΔFEV1/FVC (T1–T0)",
  Delta_MMEF = "ΔMMEF (T1–T0)"
)

custom_metadata_order <- names(pretty_labels)

# Y label formatters
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}
format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# Reader: folder -> tidy df across all outcomes
read_ancom_folder <- function(folder, prefix, lung_vars) {
  out <- list()

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(lung_vars))) {
    f <- file.path(folder, paste0(prefix, "_", lung_vars$file_suffix[i], ".csv"))
    if (!file.exists(f)) next

    df <- readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
    if (!nrow(df)) next

    lfc_col <- paste0("lfc_", lung_vars$model_var[i])
    q_col   <- paste0("q_",   lung_vars$model_var[i])
    ps_col  <- paste0("passed_ss_", lung_vars$model_var[i])

    if (!all(c("taxon", lfc_col, q_col, ps_col) %in% names(df))) next

    out[[length(out) + 1]] <- tibble::tibble(
      feature   = as.character(df$taxon),
      metadata  = lung_vars$plot_var[i],
      coef      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[lfc_col]])),
      q_value   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[q_col]])),
      passed_ss = as.logical(df[[ps_col]]),
      label = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(q_value)  ~ "",
        q_value <= 0.05 ~ "***",
        q_value <= 0.10 ~ "**",
        q_value <= 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE            ~ ""
      )
    )
  }

  d <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  d %>%
    mutate(
      metadata = factor(metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order),
      metadata_plot = factor(pretty_labels[as.character(metadata)],
                             levels = unname(pretty_labels[custom_metadata_order]))
    )
}

# KEY: keep taxa with ANY non-empty label, but keep full rows across outcomes
keep_labeled_taxa_full_rows <- function(df) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(df)

  keep_feats <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(label) & label != "") %>%
    distinct(feature) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df <- df %>% filter(feature %in% keep_feats)
  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  # ensure complete "row" across all outcomes
  df <- df %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      feature,
      metadata = custom_metadata_order,
      fill = list(coef = NA_real_, q_value = NA_real_, passed_ss = FALSE, label = "")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      metadata = factor(metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order),
      metadata_plot = factor(pretty_labels[as.character(metadata)],
                             levels = unname(pretty_labels[custom_metadata_order]))
    )

  # optional y ordering by best q-value
  feat_order <- df %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    summarise(best_q = suppressWarnings(min(q_value, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(best_q = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q), NA_real_, best_q)) %>%
    arrange(best_q) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df$feature <- factor(df$feature, levels = rev(feat_order))
  df
}

make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no taxa with q≤0.25)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label, color = ifelse(passed_ss, "black", "white")),
      size = 4, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_identity() +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7], midpoint = 0,
      name = "LFC"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title  = element_blank(),
      panel.grid  = element_blank(),
      plot.title  = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  else               p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
}

# ---- Read, filter, plot ----
np_asv   <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_ASV,   "ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV",   lung_vars)   %>% keep_labeled_taxa_full_rows()
op_asv   <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_ASV,   "ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV",   lung_vars)   %>% keep_labeled_taxa_full_rows()
np_genus <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_Genus, "ANCOMBC2_NP_Genus", lung_vars)   %>% keep_labeled_taxa_full_rows()
op_genus <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_Genus, "ANCOMBC2_OP_Genus", lung_vars)   %>% keep_labeled_taxa_full_rows()

p_np_asv   <- make_heatmap(np_asv,   "T0 NP (ASV) — taxa with q≤0.25 anywhere", "ASV")
p_op_asv   <- make_heatmap(op_asv,   "T0 OP (ASV) — taxa with q≤0.25 anywhere", "ASV")
p_np_genus <- make_heatmap(np_genus, "T0 NP (Genus) — taxa with q≤0.25 anywhere", "Genus")
p_op_genus <- make_heatmap(op_genus, "T0 OP (Genus) — taxa with q≤0.25 anywhere", "Genus")

p_asv_grid <- (p_np_asv | p_op_asv)
p_gen_grid <- (p_np_genus | p_op_genus)

ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_ASV_sig.svg"),
       p_asv_grid, width = 10, height = 5)

ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_Genus_sig.svg"),
       p_gen_grid, width = 8, height = 4)
```

# MaAsLin3
```{r}
outcomes_raw <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1", "FVC_pred_T1", "FEV1FVC_pred_T1", "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred", "delta_FVC_pred", "delta_FEV1FVC_pred", "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

covariates <- c("age_T0", "gender_T0", "smoke_status_T0", "season_microbiome_sampling_T0")

safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)
out_root  <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin3"

# CORE FUNCTION
run_maaslin3_longitudinal <- function(ps, outcome_var, covariates, out_dir,
                                      min_n = 10, verbose = TRUE,
                                      q_cutoff = NULL,
                                      reference = NULL) {

  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))

  meta0 <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)

  if (!outcome_var %in% colnames(meta0)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] outcome missing: ", outcome_var)
    return(NULL)
  }

  miss_cov <- setdiff(covariates, colnames(meta0))
  if (length(miss_cov)) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] missing covariates: ", paste(miss_cov, collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }

  fixed <- c(outcome_var, covariates)

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # STRICT TYPE CLEANING
  # --------------------------------------------------------

  # outcome
  meta0[[outcome_var]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta0[[outcome_var]])))

  # covariates
  if ("age_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$age_T0 <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta0$age_T0)))
  }

  if ("gender_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$gender_T0 <- factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(meta0$gender_T0)),
      levels = c("Male", "Female")
    )
  }

  if ("smoke_status_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$smoke_status_T0 <- factor(
      tolower(as.character(meta0$smoke_status_T0)),
      levels = c("non", "former", "current"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  if ("season_microbiome_sampling_T0" %in% covariates) {
    meta0$season_microbiome_sampling_T0 <- factor(
      stringr::str_to_title(as.character(meta0$season_microbiome_sampling_T0)),
      levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn"),
      ordered = TRUE
    )
  }

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # COMPLETE CASE FILTER
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  keep <- stats::complete.cases(meta0[, fixed, drop = FALSE])

  if (verbose) {
    message(
      "  outcome non-NA: ", sum(!is.na(meta0[[outcome_var]])), "/", nrow(meta0),
      " | complete cases: ", sum(keep), "/", nrow(meta0)
    )
  }

  ps2 <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep, ps)

  if (phyloseq::nsamples(ps2) < min_n) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] too few samples after filtering")
    return(NULL)
  }

  meta_df <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps2), check.names = FALSE)

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # DROP ZERO-VARIANCE PREDICTORS
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  drop_fx <- vapply(fixed, function(nm) {
    x <- meta_df[[nm]]
    if (is.factor(x)) {
      nlevels(droplevels(x)) < 2
    } else if (is.numeric(x)) {
      isTRUE(all.equal(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE), 0))
    } else {
      FALSE
    }
  }, logical(1))

  if (any(drop_fx)) {
    if (verbose) message("  dropping zero-variance: ", paste(fixed[drop_fx], collapse = ", "))
    fixed <- fixed[!drop_fx]
  }

  if (!outcome_var %in% fixed) return(NULL)

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # OTU TABLE
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  otu <- as(phyloseq::otu_table(ps2), "matrix")
  if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(ps2)) otu <- t(otu)

  otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu, check.names = FALSE)
  otu_df[] <- lapply(otu_df, function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))

  # align
  common <- intersect(rownames(meta_df), rownames(otu_df))
  meta_df <- meta_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
  otu_df  <- otu_df[common, , drop = FALSE]

  if (!identical(rownames(meta_df), rownames(otu_df))) {
    if (verbose) message("  [SKIP] rowname mismatch after alignment")
    return(NULL)
  }

  if (nrow(meta_df) < min_n) return(NULL)

  # --------------------------------------------------------
  # RUN MODEL
  # --------------------------------------------------------
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  formula_str <- paste0("~ ", paste(fixed, collapse = " + "))

  fit <- maaslin3::maaslin3(
    input_data        = otu_df,
    input_metadata    = meta_df,
    output            = out_dir,
    formula           = formula_str,
    normalization     = "NONE",
    transform         = "LOG",
    min_abundance     = 0,
    min_prevalence    = 0,
    plot_associations = FALSE,
    plot_summary_plot = FALSE,
    augment           = TRUE,
    reference         = reference
  )

  # keep BOTH abundance and prevalence results if present
  abundance_res  <- NULL
  prevalence_res <- NULL

  if (!is.null(fit$fit_data_abundance$results) && nrow(fit$fit_data_abundance$results) > 0) {
    abundance_res <- as.data.frame(fit$fit_data_abundance$results, check.names = FALSE)
  }

  if (!is.null(fit$fit_data_prevalence$results) && nrow(fit$fit_data_prevalence$results) > 0) {
    prevalence_res <- as.data.frame(fit$fit_data_prevalence$results, check.names = FALSE)
  }

  res <- bind_rows(abundance_res, prevalence_res)

  if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) return(NULL)

  res <- res %>%
    dplyr::filter(metadata == outcome_var)

  if (!nrow(res)) return(NULL)


  # HARMONISE STANDARD MAASLIN3 Q-VALUES
  res <- res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      pval_individual = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(pval_individual)),
      qval_individual = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_individual)),
      pval_joint      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(pval_joint)),
      qval_joint      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_joint)),
      coef            = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coef)),
      stderr          = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(stderr))
    )

  res <- res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      qval_standard = dplyr::case_when(
        !is.na(qval_individual) ~ qval_individual,
        !is.na(qval_joint) ~ qval_joint,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      pval_standard = dplyr::case_when(
        !is.na(pval_individual) ~ pval_individual,
        !is.na(pval_joint) ~ pval_joint,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      )
    )

  # ADD CI + LABELS (STANDARD)
  res <- res %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      conf.low  = ifelse(!is.na(coef) & !is.na(stderr), coef - 1.96 * stderr, NA_real_),
      conf.high = ifelse(!is.na(coef) & !is.na(stderr), coef + 1.96 * stderr, NA_real_),
      label_standard = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(qval_standard)     ~ NA_character_,
        qval_standard <= 0.05    ~ "***",
        qval_standard <= 0.10    ~ "**",
        qval_standard <= 0.25    ~ "*",
        TRUE                     ~ NA_character_
      ),
      outcome = outcome_var
    )

  if (!is.null(q_cutoff)) {
    res <- res %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(qval_standard) & qval_standard <= q_cutoff)

    if (!nrow(res)) return(NULL)
  }

  res
}


# BATCH RUNNER
run_all_maaslin3_models <- function(ps_lists, outcomes, covars, out_root,
                                    min_n = 10, q_cutoff = NULL, verbose = TRUE) {
  results_all <- list()

  for (level in names(ps_lists)) {
    for (niche in names(ps_lists[[level]])) {
      ps <- ps_lists[[level]][[niche]]
      if (is.null(ps)) next

      for (v in outcomes) {
        subdir <- file.path(out_root, niche, level)
        dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

        out_dir <- file.path(subdir, safe_name(v))
        dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

        message("Running: ", niche, " | ", level, " | ", v)

        res <- tryCatch(
          run_maaslin3_longitudinal(
            ps = ps,
            outcome_var = v,
            covariates = covars,
            out_dir = out_dir,
            min_n = min_n,
            verbose = verbose,
            q_cutoff = q_cutoff
          ),
          error = function(e) {
            message("  [ERROR] ", conditionMessage(e))
            return(NULL)
          }
        )

        if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) {
          message("No results for: ", niche, " | ", level, " | ", v)
          next
        }

        res$niche <- niche
        res$level <- level

        results_all[[paste(niche, level, v, sep = "_")]] <- res

        fn <- paste0(niche, "_", level, "_", safe_name(v), ".csv")
        readr::write_csv(res, file.path(subdir, fn))
      }
    }
  }

  res_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_all)

  # ADD LESS STRICT POST HOC FDR
  # Adjust only within niche x level x outcome x model
  if (nrow(res_df) > 0) {
    res_df <- res_df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(niche, level, outcome, model) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        qval_within_model = p.adjust(pval_standard, method = "BH"),
        label_within_model = dplyr::case_when(
          is.na(qval_within_model)   ~ NA_character_,
          qval_within_model <= 0.05  ~ "***",
          qval_within_model <= 0.10  ~ "**",
          qval_within_model <= 0.25  ~ "*",
          TRUE                       ~ NA_character_
        )
      ) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  # save full summary with both q-value versions
  readr::write_csv(
    res_df,
    file.path(out_root, "MaAsLin3_all_results_summary_with_both_qvalues.csv")
  )

  # save a simpler summary too
  if (nrow(res_df) > 0) {
    res_df %>%
      dplyr::select(
        feature, metadata, model, coef, stderr,
        pval_standard, qval_standard, label_standard,
        qval_within_model, label_within_model,
        outcome, niche, level, conf.low, conf.high
      ) %>%
      readr::write_csv(
        file.path(out_root, "MaAsLin3_results_compact_with_both_qvalues.csv")
      )
  }

  res_df
}

# INPUT PHYLOSEQ LISTS
ps_list_DA_ASV <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_abs_filt
)

ps_list_DA_genus <- list(
  T0_NP = t0_np_ps_genus_abs_filt,
  T0_OP = t0_op_ps_genus_abs_filt
)

ps_lists_longitudinal <- list(
  ASV   = ps_list_DA_ASV,
  Genus = ps_list_DA_genus
)

# RUN MAASLIN3
maaslin3_results_longitudinal <- run_all_maaslin3_models(
  ps_lists  = ps_lists_longitudinal,
  outcomes  = outcomes_raw,
  covars    = covariates,
  out_root  = out_root,
  min_n     = 10,
  q_cutoff  = NULL,
  verbose   = TRUE
)


# QUICK CHECKS
maaslin3_results_longitudinal %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_total = dplyr::n(),
    min_p = min(pval_standard, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_standard = min(qval_standard, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_within_model = min(qval_within_model, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_q25_standard = sum(qval_standard <= 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_q25_within_model = sum(qval_within_model <= 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

maaslin3_results_longitudinal %>%
  dplyr::group_by(niche, level, outcome, model) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    min_p = min(pval_standard, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_standard = min(qval_standard, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_q_within_model = min(qval_within_model, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_q25_standard = sum(qval_standard <= 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_q25_within_model = sum(qval_within_model <= 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print(n = Inf)



# standard MaAsLin3 significant hits
maaslin3_results_longitudinal %>%
  filter(qval_standard <= 0.25) %>%
  arrange(qval_standard) %>%
  select(feature, outcome, niche, level, model, coef, pval_standard, qval_standard)

# less strict within-model hits
maaslin3_results_longitudinal %>%
  filter(qval_within_model <= 0.25) %>%
  arrange(qval_within_model) %>%
  select(feature, outcome, niche, level, model, coef, pval_standard, qval_within_model)
```
## MaAsLin3 heatmaps 
```{r}
### MaAsLin3 heatmaps — strict and less strict q-values
# Uses summary file with:
# - qval_standard
# - qval_within_model
# - model (Abundance / Prevalence)
# - niche, level, outcome, feature, coef

# Paths
root_dir_m3 <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin3"
summary_file_m3 <- file.path(root_dir_m3, "MaAsLin3_all_results_summary_with_both_qvalues.csv")

# Outcomes shown on x-axis
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order


# Niche colours
niche_cols <- c(
  NP = "#7987af",
  OP = "#7c674d"
)


# Helper: niche header strip
make_niche_strip <- function(label, fill, text_col = "white") {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1,
             fill = fill, colour = fill) +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = label,
             colour = text_col, fontface = "bold", size = 3.8) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
    theme_void()
}

wrap_with_niche_header <- function(plot_obj, niche = c("NP", "OP")) {
  niche <- match.arg(niche)

  header <- if (niche == "NP") {
    make_niche_strip("Nasopharynx", niche_cols["NP"])
  } else {
    make_niche_strip("Oropharynx", niche_cols["OP"])
  }

  header / plot_obj + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(0.055, 1))
}

# Label formatters
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}


# Read summary file
m3_all <- readr::read_csv(summary_file_m3, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Safety checks / harmonisation
m3_all <- m3_all %>%
  mutate(
    feature = as.character(feature),
    outcome = as.character(outcome),
    niche   = as.character(niche),
    level   = as.character(level),
    model   = as.character(model),
    coef    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coef)),
    qval_standard = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_standard)),
    qval_within_model = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_within_model)),
    model_plot = case_when(
      tolower(model) %in% c("abundance", "linear")    ~ "Abundance",
      tolower(model) %in% c("prevalence", "logistic") ~ "Prevalence",
      TRUE ~ model
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(outcome %in% custom_metadata_order)


# Reader from summary table
# q_type = "standard" or "within_model"
# q_show = NULL for all rows, or e.g. 0.25 to keep only features
#          with q <= 0.25 anywhere within that niche+level panel
read_maaslin3_summary_results <- function(df_all,
                                          niche_keep,
                                          level_keep,
                                          q_type = c("standard", "within_model"),
                                          q_show = NULL) {

  q_type <- match.arg(q_type)

  q_col <- if (q_type == "standard") "qval_standard" else "qval_within_model"

  df <- df_all %>%
    filter(
      niche == niche_keep,
      level == level_keep
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      qval_plot = .data[[q_col]],
      label = case_when(
        is.na(qval_plot)   ~ "",
        qval_plot <= 0.05  ~ "***",
        qval_plot <= 0.10  ~ "**",
        qval_plot <= 0.25  ~ "*",
        TRUE               ~ ""
      )
    )

  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  if (!is.null(q_show)) {
    keep_features <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(qval_plot) & qval_plot <= q_show) %>%
      distinct(feature) %>%
      pull(feature)

    df <- df %>%
      filter(feature %in% keep_features)

    if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  }

  df$metadata_raw <- factor(df$outcome, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  df$metadata_plot <- factor(
    pretty_labels[as.character(df$metadata_raw)],
    levels = pretty_labels
  )

  feat_order <- df %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    summarise(
      best_q = min(qval_plot, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_abs_coef = max(abs(coef), na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(best_q = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q), NA_real_, best_q)) %>%
    arrange(best_q, desc(max_abs_coef)) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df$feature <- factor(df$feature, levels = rev(feat_order))
  df$model_plot <- factor(df$model_plot, levels = c("Abundance", "Prevalence"))

  df
}

# Pretty heatmap
# - NP and OP get separate scales
# - within each niche, Abundance and Prevalence share one scale
# - outliers can be greyed out and excluded from scale
make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty <- function(df,
                                              level = c("ASV", "Genus"),
                                              fill_limits = NULL,
                                              outlier_thresh = NULL) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void())
  }

  feat_levels  <- levels(df$feature)
  meta_levels  <- levels(df$metadata_plot)
  model_levels <- levels(df$model_plot)

  df_plot <- df %>%
    select(feature, metadata_plot, model_plot, coef, label) %>%
    mutate(
      is_outlier = if (!is.null(outlier_thresh)) abs(coef) > outlier_thresh else FALSE,
      coef_plot  = if_else(is_outlier, NA_real_, coef)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      feature = factor(feat_levels, levels = feat_levels),
      metadata_plot = factor(meta_levels, levels = meta_levels),
      model_plot = factor(model_levels, levels = model_levels),
      fill = list(
        coef = NA_real_,
        label = "",
        is_outlier = FALSE,
        coef_plot = NA_real_
      )
    )

  lim <- if (is.null(fill_limits)) {
    max(abs(df_plot$coef_plot), na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    fill_limits
  }

  if (!is.finite(lim) || lim <= 0) lim <- 1

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef_plot)) +
    geom_tile(
      width = 0.995,
      height = 0.995,
      colour = NA
    ) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label),
      colour = "black",
      size = 2.6,
      fontface = "bold",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    facet_grid(. ~ model_plot, scales = "fixed", space = "fixed") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-lim, lim),
      oob = scales::squish,
      na.value = "grey80",
      name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10.5) +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey93", colour = NA),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "grey40", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, colour = "black"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey91", colour = "grey45", linewidth = 0.45),
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
        colour = "black", size = 8.8
      ),
      axis.text.y = element_text(
        colour = "black", size = 8.5,
        margin = margin(r = 4)
      ),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.5, "mm"),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 9.5),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8.5),
      legend.key.height = unit(18, "mm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(4, "mm")
    )

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p <- p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels, expand = c(0, 0))
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels, expand = c(0, 0))
  }

  p
}


# Figure builder
make_maaslin_figure <- function(df_np,
                                df_op,
                                level = c("ASV", "Genus"),
                                outlier_thresh_np = NULL,
                                outlier_thresh_op = NULL,
                                width = 10.5,
                                height = NULL) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  p_np <- make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty(
    df_np,
    level = level,
    fill_limits = NULL,
    outlier_thresh = outlier_thresh_np
  ) |> wrap_with_niche_header("NP")

  p_op <- make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty(
    df_op,
    level = level,
    fill_limits = NULL,
    outlier_thresh = outlier_thresh_op
  ) |> wrap_with_niche_header("OP")

  final_plot <- ((p_np | p_op) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(1, 1))) +
    theme(legend.position = "right")

  if (is.null(height)) {
    n_rows <- max(
      if (!is.null(df_np) && nrow(df_np)) nlevels(df_np$feature) else 0,
      if (!is.null(df_op) && nrow(df_op)) nlevels(df_op$feature) else 0
    )
    height <- max(5.5, 1.4 + n_rows * ifelse(level == "ASV", 0.26, 0.34))
  }

  list(plot = final_plot, width = width, height = height)
}


# Wrapper to build and save one set of heatmaps
# q_type = "standard" or "within_model"
# suffix is added to filenames
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps <- function(df_all,
                                             q_type = c("standard", "within_model"),
                                             q_show = NULL,
                                             outlier_thresh_asv_np = 20,
                                             outlier_thresh_asv_op = 20,
                                             outlier_thresh_genus_np = NULL,
                                             outlier_thresh_genus_op = NULL,
                                             file_suffix = "") {

  q_type <- match.arg(q_type)

  # ASV
  df_np_asv <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_NP",
    level_keep = "ASV",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  df_op_asv <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_OP",
    level_keep = "ASV",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  asv_out <- make_maaslin_figure(
    df_np = df_np_asv,
    df_op = df_op_asv,
    level = "ASV",
    outlier_thresh_np = outlier_thresh_asv_np,
    outlier_thresh_op = outlier_thresh_asv_op,
    width = 10.5
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_dir_m3, paste0("Heatmap_Maaslin3_results_ASV_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
    asv_out$plot,
    width = asv_out$width,
    height = asv_out$height
  )

  # Genus
  df_np_genus <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_NP",
    level_keep = "Genus",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  df_op_genus <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_OP",
    level_keep = "Genus",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  genus_out <- make_maaslin_figure(
    df_np = df_np_genus,
    df_op = df_op_genus,
    level = "Genus",
    outlier_thresh_np = outlier_thresh_genus_np,
    outlier_thresh_op = outlier_thresh_genus_op,
    width = 10
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_dir_m3, paste0("Heatmap_Maaslin3_results_Genus_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
    genus_out$plot,
    width = genus_out$width,
    height = genus_out$height
  )
}


# MAKE ALL FOUR VERSIONS
# 1. Strict FDR - all rows
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "standard",
  q_show = NULL,
  file_suffix = "strict_all"
)

# 2. Strict FDR - only taxa with q <= 0.25 anywhere
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "standard",
  q_show = 0.25,
  file_suffix = "strict_q025"
)

# 3. Less strict within-model FDR - all rows
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "within_model",
  q_show = NULL,
  file_suffix = "withinModel_all"
)

# 4. Less strict within-model FDR - only taxa with q <= 0.25 anywhere
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "within_model",
  q_show = 0.25,
  file_suffix = "withinModel_q025"
)
```

# MaAsLin3 heatmaps
```{r}
### heatmaps strict and less strict q-values
# Updated:
# - each NP/OP panel keeps its OWN coefficient legend
# - legend appears to the right of each plot
# - save width/height can be set manually for each output


# Paths

root_dir_m3 <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin3"
summary_file_m3 <- file.path(root_dir_m3, "MaAsLin3_all_results_summary_with_both_qvalues.csv")


# Outcomes shown on x-axis
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_T1",
  "FVC_pred_T1",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_T1",
  "MMEF_pred_T1",
  "delta_FEV1_pred",
  "delta_FVC_pred",
  "delta_FEV1FVC_pred",
  "delta_MMEF_pred"
)

pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (T1)",
  "FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (T1)",
  "MMEF % predicted (T1)",
  "Delta FEV1 % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta FEV1FVC % predicted (T1-T0)",
  "Delta MMEF % predicted (T1-T0)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order


# Niche colours
niche_cols <- c(
  NP = "#7987af",
  OP = "#7c674d"
)

# Helper: niche header strip
make_niche_strip <- function(label, fill, text_col = "white") {
  ggplot() +
    annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1,
             fill = fill, colour = fill) +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = label,
             colour = text_col, fontface = "bold", size = 3.8) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
    theme_void()
}

wrap_with_niche_header <- function(plot_obj, niche = c("NP", "OP")) {
  niche <- match.arg(niche)

  header <- if (niche == "NP") {
    make_niche_strip("Nasopharynx", niche_cols["NP"])
  } else {
    make_niche_strip("Oropharynx", niche_cols["OP"])
  }

  header / plot_obj + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(0.055, 1))
}

# Label formatters
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}


# Read summary file
m3_all <- readr::read_csv(summary_file_m3, show_col_types = FALSE)

m3_all <- m3_all %>%
  mutate(
    feature = as.character(feature),
    outcome = dplyr::coalesce(as.character(outcome), as.character(metadata)),
    niche   = as.character(niche),
    level   = as.character(level),
    model   = as.character(model),
    coef    = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(coef)),
    qval_standard = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_standard)),
    qval_within_model = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(qval_within_model)),
    model_plot = case_when(
      tolower(model) %in% c("abundance", "linear")    ~ "Abundance",
      tolower(model) %in% c("prevalence", "logistic") ~ "Prevalence",
      TRUE ~ model
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(outcome %in% custom_metadata_order)


# Reader from summary table

read_maaslin3_summary_results <- function(df_all,
                                          niche_keep,
                                          level_keep,
                                          q_type = c("standard", "within_model"),
                                          q_show = NULL) {

  q_type <- match.arg(q_type)
  q_col <- if (q_type == "standard") "qval_standard" else "qval_within_model"

  df <- df_all %>%
    filter(
      niche == niche_keep,
      level == level_keep
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      qval_plot = .data[[q_col]],
      label = case_when(
        is.na(qval_plot)   ~ "",
        qval_plot <= 0.05  ~ "***",
        qval_plot <= 0.10  ~ "**",
        qval_plot <= 0.25  ~ "*",
        TRUE               ~ ""
      )
    )

  if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  if (!is.null(q_show)) {
    keep_features <- df %>%
      filter(!is.na(qval_plot) & qval_plot <= q_show) %>%
      distinct(feature) %>%
      pull(feature)

    df <- df %>%
      filter(feature %in% keep_features)

    if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  }

  df$metadata_raw <- factor(df$outcome, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  df$metadata_plot <- factor(
    pretty_labels[as.character(df$metadata_raw)],
    levels = pretty_labels
  )

  feat_order <- df %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    summarise(
      best_q = min(qval_plot, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_abs_coef = max(abs(coef), na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(best_q = ifelse(is.infinite(best_q), NA_real_, best_q)) %>%
    arrange(best_q, desc(max_abs_coef)) %>%
    pull(feature)

  df$feature <- factor(df$feature, levels = rev(feat_order))
  df$model_plot <- factor(df$model_plot, levels = c("Abundance", "Prevalence"))

  df
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Pretty heatmap
# - one legend per plot
# - same scale within niche across abundance/prevalence
# - outliers can be greyed out and excluded from scale
# ------------------------------------------------------------
make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty <- function(df,
                                              level = c("ASV", "Genus"),
                                              fill_limits = NULL,
                                              outlier_thresh = NULL) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void())
  }

  feat_levels  <- levels(df$feature)
  meta_levels  <- levels(df$metadata_plot)
  model_levels <- levels(df$model_plot)

  df_plot <- df %>%
    select(feature, metadata_plot, model_plot, coef, label) %>%
    mutate(
      is_outlier = if (!is.null(outlier_thresh)) abs(coef) > outlier_thresh else FALSE,
      coef_plot  = if_else(is_outlier, NA_real_, coef)
    ) %>%
    tidyr::complete(
      feature = factor(feat_levels, levels = feat_levels),
      metadata_plot = factor(meta_levels, levels = meta_levels),
      model_plot = factor(model_levels, levels = model_levels),
      fill = list(
        coef = NA_real_,
        label = "",
        is_outlier = FALSE,
        coef_plot = NA_real_
      )
    )

  lim <- if (is.null(fill_limits)) {
    max(abs(df_plot$coef_plot), na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    fill_limits
  }

  if (!is.finite(lim) || lim <= 0) lim <- 1

  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef_plot)) +
    geom_tile(
      width = 0.995,
      height = 0.995,
      colour = NA
    ) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label),
      colour = "black",
      size = 5,
      fontface = "bold",
      na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    facet_grid(. ~ model_plot, scales = "fixed", space = "fixed") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-lim, lim),
      oob = scales::squish,
      na.value = "grey80",
      name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10.5) +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "grey93", colour = NA),
      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "grey40", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, colour = "black"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey91", colour = "grey45", linewidth = 0.45),
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
        colour = "black", size = 8.8
      ),
      axis.text.y = element_text(
        colour = "black", size = 8.5,
        margin = margin(r = 4)
      ),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.5, "mm"),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 9.5),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 8.5),
      legend.key.height = unit(18, "mm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(4, "mm")
    )

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p <- p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels, expand = c(0, 0))
  } else {
    p <- p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels, expand = c(0, 0))
  }

  p
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Figure builder
# IMPORTANT:
# - no guide collection
# - each niche keeps its own legend
# - width/height can be set manually
# ------------------------------------------------------------
make_maaslin_figure <- function(df_np,
                                df_op,
                                level = c("ASV", "Genus"),
                                outlier_thresh_np = NULL,
                                outlier_thresh_op = NULL) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  p_np <- make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty(
    df_np,
    level = level,
    fill_limits = NULL,
    outlier_thresh = outlier_thresh_np
  ) |> wrap_with_niche_header("NP")

  p_op <- make_maaslin3_dual_heatmap_pretty(
    df_op,
    level = level,
    fill_limits = NULL,
    outlier_thresh = outlier_thresh_op
  ) |> wrap_with_niche_header("OP")

  final_plot <- (p_np | p_op) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1))

  final_plot
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Wrapper to build and save one set of heatmaps
# You can now set width/height separately for ASV and Genus
# ------------------------------------------------------------
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps <- function(df_all,
                                             q_type = c("standard", "within_model"),
                                             q_show = NULL,
                                             outlier_thresh_asv_np = 20,
                                             outlier_thresh_asv_op = 20,
                                             outlier_thresh_genus_np = NULL,
                                             outlier_thresh_genus_op = NULL,
                                             file_suffix = "",
                                             width_asv = 14,
                                             height_asv = 8,
                                             width_genus = 12,
                                             height_genus = 7) {

  q_type <- match.arg(q_type)

  # ASV
  df_np_asv <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_NP",
    level_keep = "ASV",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  df_op_asv <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_OP",
    level_keep = "ASV",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  asv_plot <- make_maaslin_figure(
    df_np = df_np_asv,
    df_op = df_op_asv,
    level = "ASV",
    outlier_thresh_np = outlier_thresh_asv_np,
    outlier_thresh_op = outlier_thresh_asv_op
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_dir_m3, paste0("Heatmap_Maaslin3_results_ASV_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
    asv_plot,
    width = width_asv,
    height = height_asv
  )

  # Genus
  df_np_genus <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_NP",
    level_keep = "Genus",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  df_op_genus <- read_maaslin3_summary_results(
    df_all = df_all,
    niche_keep = "T0_OP",
    level_keep = "Genus",
    q_type = q_type,
    q_show = q_show
  )

  genus_plot <- make_maaslin_figure(
    df_np = df_np_genus,
    df_op = df_op_genus,
    level = "Genus",
    outlier_thresh_np = outlier_thresh_genus_np,
    outlier_thresh_op = outlier_thresh_genus_op
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_dir_m3, paste0("Heatmap_Maaslin3_results_Genus_", file_suffix, ".svg")),
    genus_plot,
    width = width_genus,
    height = height_genus
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# MAKE ALL FOUR VERSIONS
# Adjust widths/heights here as you like
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# 1. Strict FDR - all rows
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "standard",
  q_show = NULL,
  file_suffix = "strict_all",
  width_asv = 13,
  height_asv = 10,
  width_genus = 13,
  height_genus = 6
)

# 2. Strict FDR - only taxa with q <= 0.25 anywhere
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "standard",
  q_show = 0.25,
  file_suffix = "strict_q025",
  width_asv = 13,
  height_asv = 6,
  width_genus = 13,
  height_genus = 6
)

# 3. Less strict within-model FDR - all rows
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "within_model",
  q_show = NULL,
  file_suffix = "withinModel_all",
  width_asv = 13,
  height_asv = 10,
  width_genus = 13,
  height_genus = 6
)

# 4. Less strict within-model FDR - only taxa with q <= 0.25 anywhere
build_and_save_maaslin3_heatmaps(
  df_all = m3_all,
  q_type = "within_model",
  q_show = 0.25,
  file_suffix = "withinModel_q025",
  width_asv = 16,
  height_asv = 6,
  width_genus = 13,
  height_genus = 5
)
```
# Machine learning to predict lung function outcomes at T1
# ASV-level models
## Elastic net
```{r}
plan("multisession")

out_dir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/Machine_learning/Elastic_net/"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# User settings
id_col <- "ID"

seeds_n  <- 10  
cv_times <- 10   
kfold    <- 5   

covars <- c("age_T0", "gender_T0", "smoke_status_T0", "season_microbiome_sampling_T0")
outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred_T1", "FVC_pred_T1", "FEV1FVC_pred_T1", "MMEF_pred_T1")

# Helper functions
ps_to_df_prefixed <- function(ps, prefix, id_col) {
  otu <- as.data.frame(t(phyloseq::otu_table(ps)))
  meta <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps))

  if (!identical(rownames(otu), rownames(meta))) {
    stop("Row names of OTU and metadata do not match; check phyloseq object integrity.")
  }

  colnames(otu) <- paste0(prefix, colnames(otu))
  df <- cbind(meta, otu)

  if (!id_col %in% colnames(df)) {
    stop(glue("ID column '{id_col}' not found in sample_data(). Available: {paste(colnames(df), collapse=', ')}"))
  }
  df
}

preprocess_safe <- function(dat, outcome_col) {
  dat <- as.data.frame(dat)

  # outcome numeric (regression)
  y <- as.numeric(dat[[outcome_col]])

  # predictors
  x <- dat[, setdiff(names(dat), outcome_col), drop = FALSE]

  # enforce types for covariates
  x <- x %>%
    mutate(
      age_T0 = as.numeric(age_T0),
      gender_T0 = factor(gender_T0),
      smoke_status_T0 = factor(smoke_status_T0),
      season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

  # one-hot encode factors (k-1 dummies) + intercept
  mm <- stats::model.matrix(~ ., data = x)

  # drop intercept
  mm <- mm[, colnames(mm) != "(Intercept)", drop = FALSE]

  # center/scale predictors
  mm <- scale(mm)

  out <- data.frame(y = y, mm, check.names = FALSE)
  names(out)[1] <- outcome_col
  out
}

run_glmnet <- function(seed, pre_df, outcome_col, hp) {
  mikropml::run_ml(
    pre_df,
    method = "glmnet",
    outcome_colname = outcome_col,
    kfold = kfold,
    cv_times = cv_times,
    training_frac = 0.8,
    hyperparameters = hp,
    seed = seed,
    find_feature_importance = TRUE  # lets you extract variable importance (often based on coefficients)
  )
}

extract_performance <- function(model_list, dataset_name, outcome_name) {
  purrr::map_dfr(seq_along(model_list), function(i) {
    model_list[[i]]$performance %>%
      mutate(seed = i, method = "glmnet", dataset = dataset_name, outcome = outcome_name)
  })
}

extract_featimp <- function(model_list, dataset_name, outcome_name) {
  purrr::map_dfr(seq_along(model_list), function(i) {
    fi <- model_list[[i]]$feature_importance
    if (is.null(fi) || nrow(fi) == 0) return(NULL)
    fi %>% mutate(seed = i, method = "glmnet", dataset = dataset_name, outcome = outcome_name)
  })
}

# Load baseline NP + OP phyloseq and select sig ASVs
ps_np_t0 <- T0_np_ps_abs_filt
ps_op_t0 <- T0_op_ps_abs_filt

sig_np <- read.csv("../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin2/T0_NP/ASV/T0_NP_ASV_delta_FEV1_pred.csv")$feature

op_sig_path <- "../Output/Longitudinal/DA/MaAsLin2/T0_OP/ASV/T0_OP_ASV_delta_FEV1_pred.csv"
sig_op <- if (file.exists(op_sig_path)) read.csv(op_sig_path)$feature else sig_np

ps_np_sig <- prune_taxa(sig_np, ps_np_t0)
ps_op_sig <- prune_taxa(sig_op, ps_op_t0)

# Build NP/OP feature tables
df_np <- ps_to_df_prefixed(ps_np_sig, prefix = "NP_", id_col = id_col)
df_op <- ps_to_df_prefixed(ps_op_sig, prefix = "OP_", id_col = id_col)

np_taxa_cols <- grep("^NP_", names(df_np), value = TRUE)
op_taxa_cols <- grep("^OP_", names(df_op), value = TRUE)

keep_common <- c(id_col, covars, outcomes)

# OP table: covars/outcomes + OP taxa
df_op_small <- df_op %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(intersect(keep_common, names(df_op))),
                dplyr::all_of(op_taxa_cols)) %>%
  arrange(.data[[id_col]]) %>%
  distinct(.data[[id_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)

# NP table: covars/outcomes + NP taxa  (FIXED: this was missing in your script)
df_np_small <- df_np %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(intersect(keep_common, names(df_np))),
                dplyr::all_of(np_taxa_cols)) %>%
  arrange(.data[[id_col]]) %>%
  distinct(.data[[id_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)

# Combined: join OP (with covars/outcomes) + NP taxa only (to avoid duplicates)
df_np_taxa <- df_np %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(id_col), dplyr::all_of(np_taxa_cols)) %>%
  arrange(.data[[id_col]]) %>%
  distinct(.data[[id_col]], .keep_all = TRUE)

m_comb <- inner_join(df_op_small, df_np_taxa, by = id_col)

m_np <- df_np_small
m_op <- df_op_small

datasets <- list(
  Combined = m_comb,
  NP = m_np,
  OP = m_op
)

# GLMNET hyperparameters (small grid for speed)
hp_glmnet <- list(
  alpha  = c(0, 0.5, 1),              # ridge / elastic net / lasso
  lambda = c(0.001, 0.005, 0.01, 0.05) # small grid for speed
)

all_perf <- list()
all_feat <- list()

# Training loop: GLMNET only
for (outcome in outcomes) {
  for (ds_name in names(datasets)) {

    dat <- datasets[[ds_name]]

    taxa_cols <- switch(
      ds_name,
      Combined = c(grep("^OP_", names(dat), value = TRUE),
                   grep("^NP_", names(dat), value = TRUE)),
      NP = grep("^NP_", names(dat), value = TRUE),
      OP = grep("^OP_", names(dat), value = TRUE)
    )

    m_in <- dat %>%
      dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(c(outcome, covars, taxa_cols))) %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[outcome]])) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        age_T0 = as.numeric(age_T0),
        gender_T0 = factor(gender_T0),
        smoke_status_T0 = factor(smoke_status_T0),
        season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)
      )

    pre <- preprocess_safe(m_in, outcome_col = outcome)

    message("Running glmnet on ", ds_name, " outcome=", outcome)

    models <- future_map(
      1:seeds_n,
      ~ run_glmnet(.x, pre_df = pre, outcome_col = outcome, hp = hp_glmnet),
      .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE)
    )

    perf <- extract_performance(models, ds_name, outcome)
    all_perf[[paste(outcome, ds_name, "glmnet", sep = "_")]] <- perf

    readr::write_csv(perf, file.path(out_dir, glue("perf_{outcome}_{ds_name}_glmnet.csv")))
    saveRDS(models, file.path(out_dir, glue("models_{outcome}_{ds_name}_glmnet.rds")))

    fi <- extract_featimp(models, ds_name, outcome)
    all_feat[[paste(outcome, ds_name, "glmnet", sep = "_")]] <- fi
    if (!is.null(fi) && nrow(fi) > 0) {
      readr::write_csv(fi, file.path(out_dir, glue("glmnet_featimp_{outcome}_{ds_name}.csv")))
    }
  }
}

perf_all <- bind_rows(all_perf)
readr::write_csv(perf_all, file.path(out_dir, "perf_all_outcomes_all_datasets_GLMNET.csv"))

feat_all <- bind_rows(all_feat)
if (!is.null(feat_all) && nrow(feat_all) > 0) {
  readr::write_csv(feat_all, file.path(out_dir, "featimp_all_outcomes_all_datasets_GLMNET.csv"))
}


# Performance summary
perf_summary <- perf_all %>%
  group_by(outcome, dataset) %>%
  summarise(
    n_splits = n(),
    test_R2_median = median(Rsquared, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_R2_IQR = paste0(
      round(quantile(Rsquared, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "–",
      round(quantile(Rsquared, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    ),
    test_RMSE_median = median(RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_RMSE_IQR = paste0(
      round(quantile(RMSE, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "–",
      round(quantile(RMSE, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(outcome, desc(test_R2_median))

perf_summary

write_csv(perf_summary, "../Output/Longitudinal/Machine_learning/Elastic_net_performance.csv")


# Boxplot of R2s of all models 
outcome_labs <- c(
  FEV1_pred_T1 = "FEV1",
  FVC_pred_T1 = "FVC",
  FEV1FVC_pred_T1 = "FEV1/FVC",
  MMEF_pred_T1 = "MMEF"
)

# Add median Test R² label per facet (outcome x dataset) -
annot_df <- perf_summary %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = factor(outcome, levels = names(outcome_labs)),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("NP", "OP", "Combined")),
    label = paste0("median R² = ", sprintf("%.2f", test_R2_median))
  )

r2_long <- perf_all %>%
  dplyr::select(outcome, dataset, method, seed, any_of("Rsquared")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Rsquared)) %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("NP", "OP", "Combined"))) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = factor(outcome, levels = names(outcome_labs)),
    dataset = factor(dataset, levels = c("NP", "OP", "Combined"))
  )

p_r2 <- ggplot(r2_long, aes(x = method, y = Rsquared, color = dataset, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.25) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) +
  # annotation in top-left of each facet 
  geom_text(
    data = annot_df,
    aes(label = label),
    x = -Inf, y = Inf,
    hjust = -0.05, vjust = 2,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 2.3,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_grid2(
    outcome ~ dataset, scales = "free_y",
    labeller = labeller(outcome = outcome_labs),
    strip = strip_themed(
      background_x = list(
        NP = element_rect(fill = "#7987af", color = NA),
        OP = element_rect(fill = "#7c674d", color = NA),
        Combined = element_rect(fill = "grey40", color = NA)
      ),
      text_x = element_text(color = "white", face = "bold")
    )
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(NP = "#7987af", OP = "#7c674d", Combined = "grey40")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = c(NP = "#7987af", OP = "#7c674d", Combined = "grey40")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Test R²", title = "Performance (Test R²) across datasets") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_r2

ggsave("../Output/Longitudinal/Machine_learning/Fig_R2_all_outcomes.svg", p_r2, width =4, height = 5)

#### Best glmnet model ####
summary_perf <- perf_all %>%
  group_by(outcome, dataset) %>%
  summarise(
    n_splits = n(),
    test_R2_median   = median(Rsquared, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_R2_IQR_low  = quantile(Rsquared, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_R2_IQR_high = quantile(Rsquared, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_RMSE_median   = median(RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_RMSE_IQR_low  = quantile(RMSE, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    test_RMSE_IQR_high = quantile(RMSE, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    cv_RMSE_median   = median(cv_metric_RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Best dataset per outcome by highest median Test R² and lowest RMSE
overall_best <- summary_perf %>%
  arrange(desc(test_R2_median), test_RMSE_median) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1)

overall_best # Best if FVC_pred_T1 model with NP as input data

# Show R2 for best model
outcome_plot <- "FVC_pred_T1"
perf1 <- perf_all %>% filter(outcome == outcome_plot)

# R² on test 
boxplot_r2 <- perf1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(Rsquared)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(dataset, Rsquared)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Test R²", title = "Test R² across repeated splits") +
  theme_bw()

boxplot_r2


# Top features
outcome_plot <- "FVC_pred_T1"
dataset_plot <- "NP"   # "Combined" or "NP" or "OP"
top_n <- 15

mods <- readRDS(file.path(out_dir, glue("models_{outcome_plot}_{dataset_plot}_glmnet.rds")))

extract_glmnet_coefs <- function(one_run) {
  tm <- one_run$trained_model  # caret model
  bt <- tm$bestTune
  cf <- as.matrix(coef(tm$finalModel, s = bt$lambda))
  tibble(feature = rownames(cf), coef = as.numeric(cf[, 1]))
}

coef_df <- map_dfr(mods, extract_glmnet_coefs, .id = "split") %>%
  filter(feature != "(Intercept)")

coef_sum <- coef_df %>%
  group_by(feature) %>%
  summarise(
    med = median(coef, na.rm = TRUE),
    lo  = quantile(coef, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    hi  = quantile(coef, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    sel_freq = mean(coef != 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(med)))

# Label helpers
get_niche <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    str_starts(x, "NP_") ~ "NP",
    str_starts(x, "OP_") ~ "OP",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
}

format_feature_label <- function(x) {
  # taxa?
  if (str_detect(x, "^(NP_|OP_)")) {
    x2 <- str_remove(x, "^(NP_|OP_)")

    parts <- str_split(x2, "_", simplify = TRUE)
    parts <- parts[parts != ""]

    last <- parts[length(parts)]
    is_num <- str_detect(last, "^[0-9]+$")

    if (is_num && length(parts) >= 2) {
      tax <- paste(parts[-length(parts)], collapse = " ")
      return(paste0("<i>", tax, "</i> (", last, ")"))
    } else {
      tax <- str_replace_all(x2, "_", " ")
      return(paste0("<i>", tax, "</i>"))
    }
  }

  # non-taxa covariates / dummy vars: remove underscores, no italics
  str_replace_all(x, "_", " ")
}

top_all <- coef_sum %>%
  slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
  mutate(
    niche = get_niche(feature),
    label = map_chr(feature, format_feature_label)
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = fct_reorder(label, med, .desc = TRUE))

top_FVC_combined <- ggplot(top_all, aes(x = med, y = label, color = niche)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lo, xmax = hi), height = 0.2) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85, size = 3) +  # fixed size (no size legend)
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(NP = "#7987af", OP = "#7c674d", Other = "grey40"),
    breaks = c("NP", "OP", "Other")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Standardized coefficient (median ± 95% across splits)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Stable features (glmnet): taxa + covariates"
  )

top_FVC_combined

#  Save plots
ggsave("../Output/Longitudinal/Machine_learning/Fig_top_features_FVC_Combinedmodel.svg", top_FVC_combined, width = 9, height = 5)
```
## Random forest
```{r}
# RANDOM FOREST to predict lung function + manuscript-ready figures
plan("multisession")

out_dir <- "../Output/Longitudinal/Machine_learning/Random_forest/"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

id_col <- "ID"
seeds_n  <- 10  
cv_times <- 10   
kfold    <- 5    

covars <- c("age_T0", "gender_T0", "smoke_status_T0", "season_microbiome_sampling_T0")
outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred_T1", "FVC_pred_T1", "FEV1FVC_pred_T1", "MMEF_pred_T1")

# RF hyperparameters (small grid for speed)
# caret RF tuning uses mtry; ranger-specific params can be added, but keep minimal for speed.
hp_rf <- list(mtry = c(2, 4, 6))

# Helper functions
ps_to_df_prefixed <- function(ps, prefix, id_col) {
  otu <- as.data.frame(t(phyloseq::otu_table(ps)))
  meta <- as.data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(ps))

  if (!identical(rownames(otu), rownames(meta))) {
    stop("Row names of OTU and metadata do not match; check phyloseq object integrity.")
  }

  colnames(otu) <- paste0(prefix, colnames(otu))
  df <- cbind(meta, otu)

  if (!id_col %in% colnames(df)) {
    stop(glue("ID column '{id_col}' not found in sample_data(). Available: {paste(colnames(df), collapse=', ')}"))
  }
  df
}

preprocess_safe <- function(dat, outcome_col) {
  dat <- as.data.frame(dat)

  # outcome numeric (regression)
  y <- as.numeric(dat[[outcome_col]])

  # predictors
  x <- dat[, setdiff(names(dat), outcome_col), drop = FALSE]

  # enforce types for covariates
  x <- x %>%
    mutate(
      age_T0 = as.numeric(age_T0),
      gender_T0 = factor(gender_T0),
      smoke_status_T0 = factor(smoke_status_T0),
      season_microbiome_sampling_T0 = factor(season_microbiome_sampling_T0)
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

  # one-hot encode factors (k-1 dummies) + intercept
  mm <- stats::model.matrix(~ ., data = x)

  # drop intercept
```
